The war has created a gas shortage in the country, due to which common people are not getting gas cylinders. But a woman has
found a solution to this. If this revolutionary solution of the woman is used, then the gas cylinder will not run out for a year. A poor
woman, whose gas cylinder in her house had expired 15 days ago, somehow managed to save money and get a gas cylinder. But
when she realized that if this gas cylinder had expired, she wouldn't get a gas cylinder, she invented such a trick, such a makeshift
solution, that one gas cylinder wouldn't last a year. Yes, you might find it hard to believe, but when the gas cylinder company
people went to this woman's house to search for her, the ground slipped from under their feet. Literally, in front of the company
officials, this woman kept the gas running day and night. She cooked a lot, but still, she doesn't seem to be letting the gas run out.
This discovery, made to prevent gas from running out quickly for the first time in the country, has gone viral everywhere. After the
gas company officials went there, they also saw that result. The company has offered to buy that makeshift solution by giving
crores of rupees to that woman. But the woman said that she would tell this solution for free to all the people in Maharashtra. A
woman who was not very educated, was poor, but she found such a trick that literally the gas company people were trying to
suppress her trick. They were trying to buy her. Because if this trick of hers comes to light, people will run gas cylinders for years,
and the company's business will shut down. Therefore, she told that technique to the whole world. Two to three days ago, her hack
literally went viral all over the internet. People can't believe how a poor woman can find such an unusual technique that can run
your gas for a whole year. Now, if you also don't want the gas cylinder in your house to run out quickly, then don't stop this video at
all without watching this video, this hack. 
This woman used to live in a small village. Her name was Rupali. The situation was so bad that after working hard all day, only two
meals a day were left in her destiny. Her husband used to do manual labor. It's a village house, so she cooked on the stove for
years. The smoke from that stove would make her eyes red, and she would cough constantly. Her lungs were in trouble. Two years
ago, the government provided gas, and Rupali felt, okay, now the days of happiness have come. Now that darkened smoke and the
burning sensation in her eyes are over forever. But friends, the happiness of the poor is like a sandcastle. The first cylinder arrived,
and it was finished within a month. There was no money at home to buy a second cylinder. Somehow, she managed to fill the gas,
but it ran out quickly again. Sometimes the gas would run out, and it couldn't be refilled for six months. But then the war between
Ukraine and Israel started, and a huge gas tension began. But as they say, need is the mother of invention. When a person is in
trouble, only then does their mind start working. Rupali decided, where is this gas going? Is the company deceiving us, or is it our
own fault? The discovery she made has become the biggest weapon in saving gas in the entire country today. 
Rupali was sitting there, feeling similarly dejected one day. A stove was lit in front of her, and she was fanning with a blowpipe.
Suddenly, a large cloud of smoke came towards her nose. She coughed loudly, and at that very moment, an idea flashed in her
head. She was thinking that we don't have money to buy gas, so we should earn money, but the poor cannot earn money beyond a
limit. Then she reversed her thought: what if this same gas cylinder lasts longer? If it lasts 40 days instead of 15 days, then my
money will be saved, right? Saved money is always earned money. This thought became the foundation of that great discovery.
Rupali started working. She wondered where the gas was leaking from. She had a small, simple smartphone that sometimes had a
network. She started searching for information on it. People were searching for how to save gas, but Rupali found out why gas is
being consumed. She asked the women around, and everyone's complaint was that when a woman brings gas, it flies away like the
wind. Then Rupali studied and found three terrible reasons for it. The third reason is the gas theft of 99% of the people and the
main reason for it ending early. 
To know what that third reason is, watch the video carefully, because one mistake can cost you ₹500 per month. Rupali found the
first reason, which happens in front of all our eyes, but we ignore it. When the gas delivery guy comes to our door with the cylinder,
he is in a great hurry. He says, "Sir, give me the money quickly, I need to go somewhere else," and he leaves us in a hurry. What do
we do? We just pay, check the cylinder's seal, and take it home. But Rupali realized that even if the seal is on, the gas might be low.
On every cylinder, the company would have clearly written, "Please check the weight while taking delivery," but do we ever weigh
on a scale? Never. Rupali noticed that many hands were moving between the gas company and reaching her house. In some
places, gas theft incidents occur, while in others, weight is reduced due to technical errors. If one to one and a half kilos of gas is
reduced in one of your cylinders, then at least four to five days are reduced right there. Think about how much gas you waste in a
year. Rupali made a rule: I won't pay until I gain weight. She brought a weighing scale from the neighboring grocery store, and
when she weighed it, her suspicion turned out to be true. The gas was really low. She caught the first theft, so remember, don't
forget to put a check on the cylinder while buying it, otherwise, your rightful money will go down the drain. 
Even after checking the weight, Rupali's gas was running out faster than expected. She realized that something else was wrong.
One night, there was a terrible silence everywhere in the house. Rupali went into the kitchen and heard a very faint crackling sound
near the gas cylinder. She couldn't smell anything, but still, that sound was coming. This is the second main reason: gas leakage.
We think that gas leaks and we will understand by the smell, but friends, sometimes the leakage is so subtle that you don't smell it,
but your gas continues to leak in the air for 24 hours. The leakage from the regulator joint, small cracks on the rubber pipe, or from
the stove button is like your money being wasted. Rupali found a great solution to this. She took water in a bowl, added some surf
or soap powder to it, and foamed it up. She applied that foam to the mouth of the regulator and both ends of the pipe. Where
bubbles appeared, there was a leak. Just like we puncture a bicycle or car and submerge the tube in water, she tried doing the
same. By using this simple trick, she avoided the danger to the house and also stopped the gas theft. If your pipe has a small hole,
then the gas for the whole month will be finished in 20 days. 
Now, Rupali, after hearing the third reason that was found, your feet will be on the ground. This is the reason why 99% of
housewives' gas burns for free. Rupali saw that the flame of the gas should be blue, but the flame of her stove was yellow or
orange. Even if the gas was turned up, the heat was still very low. The reason for this is the garbage, carbon, and soot accumulated
in the gas burner and in the nozzle below it. When you heat milk or cook lentils, sometimes it overflows and gets stuck in the
nozzle. Because of this, the gas cannot come out with full pressure. You turn the gas button completely, the gas consumption is
complete, but because the nozzle is blocked, it does not burn properly. As a result, cooking takes twice as long, and half of your gas

is wasted. For this, the gas repairman boils ₹500 to ₹1000 from you, but Rupali found a home remedy of ₹1. She first removed the
burner's mesh, washed it thoroughly with lemon and soda in hot water. Then, she pricked the small brass nozzle under the gas with
a small needle or safety pin two or three times. All the stuck garbage came out. When she lit the gas again, her stove started giving
a new blue flame. Because of this, cooking started happening quickly, and the gas was saved. 
Because of Rupali's three small but magical discoveries, the gas that used to last 15-20 days is now going beyond 40 days. Think
about it, how much savings was made if three-four cylinders of the year were saved in a poor man's house? Today, because of
Rupali's trick, not only her house but also every woman in her village is saving money. Keep these three thieves she found in mind
once again. One, check the weight while buying a cylinder, don't rush, put a scale and see if it is exactly as much as the weight is
written. Two, face and write.

page_content:
The war has created a gas shortage in the country, due to which common people are not getting gas cylinders. But a woman has
found a solution to this. If this revolutionary solution of the woman is used, then the gas cylinder will not run out for a year. A poor
woman, whose gas cylinder in her house had expired 15 days ago, somehow managed to save money and get a gas cylinder. But
when she realized that if this gas cylinder had expired, she wouldn't get a gas cylinder, she invented such a trick, such a makeshift
solution, that one gas cylinder wouldn't last a year. Yes, you might find it hard to believe, but when the gas cylinder company
people went to this woman's house to search for her, the ground slipped from under their feet. Literally, in front of the company
officials, this woman kept the gas running day and night. She cooked a lot, but still, she doesn't seem to be letting the gas run out.
This discovery, made to prevent gas from running out quickly for the first time in the country, has gone viral everywhere. After the
gas company officials went there, they also saw that result. The company has offered to buy that makeshift solution by giving
crores of rupees to that woman. But the woman said that she would tell this solution for free to all the people in Maharashtra. A
woman who was not very educated, was poor, but she found such a trick that literally the gas company people were trying to
suppress her trick. They were trying to buy her. Because if this trick of hers comes to light, people will run gas cylinders for years,
and the company's business will shut down. Therefore, she told that technique to the whole world. Two to three days ago, her hack
literally went viral all over the internet. People can't believe how a poor woman can find such an unusual technique that can run
your gas for a whole year. Now, if you also don't want the gas cylinder in your house to run out quickly, then don't stop this video at
all without watching this video, this hack. 
This woman used to live in a small village. Her name was Rupali. The situation was so bad that after working hard all day, only two
meals a day were left in her destiny. Her husband used to do manual labor. It's a village house, so she cooked on the stove for
years. The smoke from that stove would make her eyes red, and she would cough constantly. Her lungs were in trouble. Two years
ago, the government provided gas, and Rupali felt, okay, now the days of happiness have come. Now that darkened smoke and the
burning sensation in her eyes are over forever. But friends, the happiness of the poor is like a sandcastle. The first cylinder arrived,
and it was finished within a month. There was no money at home to buy a second cylinder. Somehow, she managed to fill the gas,
but it ran out quickly again. Sometimes the gas would run out, and it couldn't be refilled for six months. But then the war between
Ukraine and Israel started, and a huge gas tension began. But as they say, need is the mother of invention. When a person is in
trouble, only then does their mind start working. Rupali decided, where is this gas going? Is the company deceiving us, or is it our
own fault? The discovery she made has become the biggest weapon in saving gas in the entire country today. 
Rupali was sitting there, feeling similarly dejected one day. A stove was lit in front of her, and she was fanning with a blowpipe.
Suddenly, a large cloud of smoke came towards her nose. She coughed loudly, and at that very moment, an idea flashed in her
head. She was thinking that we don't have money to buy gas, so we should earn money, but the poor cannot earn money beyond a
limit. Then she reversed her thought: what if this same gas cylinder lasts longer? If it lasts 40 days instead of 15 days, then my
money will be saved, right? Saved money is always earned money. This thought became the foundation of that great discovery.
Rupali started working. She wondered where the gas was leaking from. She had a small, simple smartphone that sometimes had a
network. She started searching for information on it. People were searching for how to save gas, but Rupali found out why gas is
being consumed. She asked the women around, and everyone's complaint was that when a woman brings gas, it flies away like the
wind. Then Rupali studied and found three terrible reasons for it. The third reason is the gas theft of 99% of the people and the
main reason for it ending early. 
To know what that third reason is, watch the video carefully, because one mistake can cost you ₹500 per month. Rupali found the
first reason, which happens in front of all our eyes, but we ignore it. When the gas delivery guy comes to our door with the cylinder,
he is in a great hurry. He says, "Sir, give me the money quickly, I need to go somewhere else," and he leaves us in a hurry. What do
we do? We just pay, check the cylinder's seal, and take it home. But Rupali realized that even if the seal is on, the gas might be low.
On every cylinder, the company would have clearly written, "Please check the weight while taking delivery," but do we ever weigh
on a scale? Never. Rupali noticed that many hands were moving between the gas company and reaching her house. In some
places, gas theft incidents occur, while in others, weight is reduced due to technical errors. If one to one and a half kilos of gas is
reduced in one of your cylinders, then at least four to five days are reduced right there. Think about how much gas you waste in a
year. Rupali made a rule: I won't pay until I gain weight. She brought a weighing scale from the neighboring grocery store, and
when she weighed it, her suspicion turned out to be true. The gas was really low. She caught the first theft, so remember, don't
forget to put a check on the cylinder while buying it, otherwise, your rightful money will go down the drain. 
Even after checking the weight, Rupali's gas was running out faster than expected. She realized that something else was wrong.
One night, there was a terrible silence everywhere in the house. Rupali went into the kitchen and heard a very faint crackling sound
near the gas cylinder. She couldn't smell anything, but still, that sound was coming. This is the second main reason: gas leakage.
We think that gas leaks and we will understand by the smell, but friends, sometimes the leakage is so subtle that you don't smell it,
but your gas continues to leak in the air for 24 hours. The leakage from the regulator joint, small cracks on the rubber pipe, or from
the stove button is like your money being wasted. Rupali found a great solution to this. She took water in a bowl, added some surf
or soap powder to it, and foamed it up. She applied that foam to the mouth of the regulator and both ends of the pipe. Where
bubbles appeared, there was a leak. Just like we puncture a bicycle or car and submerge the tube in water, she tried doing the
same. By using this simple trick, she avoided the danger to the house and also stopped the gas theft. If your pipe has a small hole,
then the gas for the whole month will be finished in 20 days. 
Now, Rupali, after hearing the third reason that was found, your feet will be on the ground. This is the reason why 99% of
housewives' gas burns for free. Rupali saw that the flame of the gas should be blue, but the flame of her stove was yellow or
orange. Even if the gas was turned up, the heat was still very low. The reason for this is the garbage, carbon, and soot accumulated
in the gas burner and in the nozzle below it. When you heat milk or cook lentils, sometimes it overflows and gets stuck in the
nozzle. Because of this, the gas cannot come out with full pressure. You turn the gas button completely, the gas consumption is
complete, but because the nozzle is blocked, it does not burn properly. As a result, cooking takes twice as long, and half of your gas

is wasted. For this, the gas repairman boils ₹500 to ₹1000 from you, but Rupali found a home remedy of ₹1. She first removed the
burner's mesh, washed it thoroughly with lemon and soda in hot water. Then, she pricked the small brass nozzle under the gas with
a small needle or safety pin two or three times. All the stuck garbage came out. When she lit the gas again, her stove started giving
a new blue flame. Because of this, cooking started happening quickly, and the gas was saved. 
Because of Rupali's three small but magical discoveries, the gas that used to last 15-20 days is now going beyond 40 days. Think
about it, how much savings was made if three-four cylinders of the year were saved in a poor man's house? Today, because of
Rupali's trick, not only her house but also every woman in her village is saving money. Keep these three thieves she found in mind
once again. One, check the weight while buying a cylinder, don't rush, put a scale and see if it is exactly as much as the weight is
written. Two, face and write.

Special gift for farmers on Gudi Padwa on the Farmer ID card. Yes, all farmers who have taken out the Farmer ID card or who have
applied will get ₹15,000. The decision to give ₹15,000 on the Farmer ID card on the occasion of Gudi Padwa has been taken by the
Agriculture Minister of the Central Government. Now, all the farmers who have taken out this Farmer ID card or who have applied
will get the benefit of 10 schemes on the Farmer ID card. Along with that, a special bonus of ₹15,000 will be deposited directly into
the bank account on the occasion of Gudi Padwa. For Baliraja, this is the biggest and happiest news so far. Now, all the farmers who
have taken out Farmer ID cards or have applied to take them out, all those farmers' fortunes are now going to shine. The Central
Government's agriculture department has taken a revolutionary decision, through which farmers who have taken out Farmer ID
cards will be given a special grant of ₹15,000 in their bank accounts on the occasion of Gudi Padwa, and not only that, but along
with this, a free benefit of 10 schemes will be given. Look, a Farmer ID card is your digital agricultural identity. It is a part of the
grand AgriTech campaign of the Central Government. In this single card, all your information is collected, such as your Aadhaar
number, your area's 7/12 and 8A records, how much land you own, where your bank account is, which crops you harvest— all this
information is in a single identity card. Because of this, every farmer has complete and digital records available to the
administration. 
The biggest advantage of this is government schemes. The third facility is direct benefit transfer. The money from your government
schemes, such as discounts on accounts or tractor financing, or grants for any matter, crop insurance— all these things will be
deposited in your bank account. There will be no middleman or agent in between. All transactions will be very transparent. The
fourth facility is easy crop insurance and registration for schemes like Pantpramadan Fasal Bima Yojana. Getting compensation will
be very easy because your crop information will already be registered on the ID. The fifth facility is administrative. Seventh
convenience, free advice from agricultural experts. If you face any difficulties while farming, if you get a disease, which spray to
use, which fertilizer to use— if you need such information, then you will get guidance from agricultural experts through ID for these
questions for free. Eighth convenience, availability of quality seeds and fertilizers. You will definitely get information about which
seeds and fertilizers are available at the government center in your area. Facility number nine, easy loan scheme. What farmers
need to obtain crop loans and other agricultural loans— now there is no need to submit all the documents, only one card will be
required for the complete work. 
Now you might be wondering how to make such beneficial cards. So, making a card is very easy. You have to go to the nearest CSC
or our government service center and apply. For that, you will need your Aadhaar card, 7/12 extract, bank passbook, and
photograph. The application process has also started, and you can get it done through that. Now, the most important question is,
from the beginning of which farmer ID will ₹15,000 be received? Which farmer will receive it? Now listen. Because of the Farmer ID,
whatever government schemes are there, meaning those coming from now on and those before that, their direct transfer will
happen in your account. There will be no difficulty of any kind in this. 
So, this division of ₹15,000 is in three phases. Now, as you know, the Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana, which is known
as PM Kisan Yojana, under this scheme, the government gives you ₹6,000 every year in three installments. That means, look,
₹2,000 in the first four months, ₹2,000 in the second four months, and ₹2,000 in the third four months. So that means four months
together, that is, approximately three phases are done for ₹2,000. So, you get such ₹6,000. But this is ₹6,000. After that, a scheme
from the Maharashtra government came, the Namo Shetkari Mahasanman Nidhi Yojana. So, under this scheme also, farmers have
started receiving another ₹6,000 from the state government. This is also ₹2,000-₹2,000 every four months. So, in this way, ₹6,000
from the Central Government, ₹6,000 from the state— a total of ₹12,000 was being received until today. But now the state
government has made a big announcement. In this manifesto, it has been said that farmers can now be given an additional bonus
of ₹3,000. That means 12 + 3,000, so ₹15,000 will be received by you from the state government. 
And it is connected to the future of agriculture. Why is this important? Look, this gift of ₹15,000 given by the government on the
auspicious occasion of Gudi Padwa is not just a number, but a tribute to your hard work. Until today, we had to rush around every
time with documents for crop insurance or the new honorarium scheme, but now this Farmer ID card is your digital identity. So,
middlemen and agents will disappear, and the rightful money will go directly to your bank.

Urgent notice to all people: These 10 items will become four times more expensive. A very shocking news has come to light. Yes, in
48 hours, the prices of these 10 items will increase four times. Due to the war between Iran and Israel, there will be huge inflation in
the entire country in the next 48 hours. The government has announced the new prices of 10 items. Now, to buy the item that you
were buying for ₹20, you will now have to pay ₹80. There are 10 things that are used daily, without which our day does not start
and does not end. The common man's pocket will now be greatly affected because the government has announced a list of these
10 things. People have only been given two days now, because on the third day, the inflation rate will increase. Now, if you want to
avoid the price increase, then buy these 10 items today itself, because if you go to buy these items in two more days, then you will
get an item of ₹10 for ₹40, and if you delay further, even after paying ₹40, that item will not be left in the market. Look, these are
very important items. Without these, the cooking in the house doesn't happen, nor does any work in the house get done. These are
10 things that a person's day cannot be complete without. Therefore, do not stop this video even by mistake without watching this
list. If you listen to this video carefully by giving it two minutes, you will benefit 100% and save thousands of rupees. Otherwise,
there will be no use in regretting later. Do not take this video lightly, because this is a question of your rightful values.
Friends, do you remember, just 5-6 days ago, a news story spread like wildfire on social media that gas would run out, gas would
not be available, gas cylinders would not be available? News was coming in this way on social media. But the government clarified
that there will be no gas shortage. However, you must have seen that there are literally gas lines. People are not getting gas
cylinders. So, from this, you can understand how the entire country is now facing a shortage. Now, this scarcity is not only limited to
gas, petrol, and diesel, but it has also come to things that can increase your monthly expenses fourfold. This is not a simple news
for the people of the state, but it is a very urgent warning. Listen carefully, because you only have 48 hours left now. If you don't
become cautious in the next three days, your pocket will be so throbbing that it will be difficult for you to recover from that shock.
The consequences of the war that has ignited between Iran, Israel, and America have reached your kitchen directly. A single stir has
been created throughout Maharashtra today, because due to this war, the prices of 10 important items have been announced,
seeing which even big businessmen are trembling. Such very important items are now going to become terribly expensive. The
government has almost finalized its list and has given people only a two-day ultimatum, because on the third day, such a high level
of inflation will be reached that everything will go out of the reach of the common man. If you want to save yourself and your family
from this price increase crisis, then buy these 10 items today, right now, outside your house. Because if you go after two days, you
will not get that item in the market even after paying four times the money.
In this video, I am going to give you a list of 10 things without which your cooking in the house does not happen, nor does any work
get done. These are such things that without which a person's day cannot be completed. Therefore, do not stop this video even by
mistake without watching this list. If you listen to this video carefully by giving it two minutes, then you will benefit 100% and your
thousands of rupees will be saved. Otherwise, there will be no use in regretting later. Do not take this video lightly, because this is a
question of your rightful money.
Friends, do you remember, just five or six days ago, a news story spread like wildfire on social media that gas will run out, gas will
not be available, gas cylinders will not be available? News was coming on social media in this way. Even today, in many places,
people have to wander around to get a gas cylinder. From this, you might have noticed one thing: when smoke comes out, there is
definitely a fire. Now, the entire country is no longer just struggling with gas, petrol, and diesel; rather, this struggle has now come
down to essential commodities that can increase your monthly household expenses fourfold. After three days, the prices of these
items will skyrocket. We, instead of just relying on the news, went directly to the market and contacted some big traders and
people in the export sector. These are businessmen who have been in this business for the last 30 to 40 years. They said that
whenever wars have happened in the history of the world, what situation is created. They have given some secret tips for
customers, which will be a bonus for you. If you watch this video wholeheartedly, you can save at least 10 to 20 thousand rupees.
You might think that this is being exaggerated, but after the video ends, you will understand what I am saying. We are presenting
this confidential information, obtained from expert traders and knowledgeable people, to you in sequence.
Now, let's move towards that list. What is the first item, how much will its price increase, and how to store it? We will now see all of
this in detail. The first and most important item on the list, without which a housewife's kitchen cannot function, is cooking oil. Look,
in the last year, the price of edible oil has already increased by 30%, but now this increase will be quadrupled. Why? Because
whatever oil it is, whether it's groundnut, sunflower, or soybean, palm oil is used in large quantities in it. We import this palm oil
from foreign countries by ships. Now, the sea route through which these ships come, the war is going on there in Iran and Israel.
What does it mean? The movement of ships has stopped due to the fear of war. A shortage of crude oil will be created in the
market. When the demand is high and the supply is low, the price increase is a white line on a black stone. Traders have said that
the oil can, which is available today for 2200-2500, will soon go beyond 3000. Therefore, it would be wise to store two-three oil cans
at home right now.
The second item is lentils and pulses. In our Indian cuisine, the leaf doesn't move without lentils, rice, or amti. The prices of toor dal,
moong dal, and chana dal are now going to increase. Now you might say, lentils are grown in our country, so why would the prices
increase? The answer is simple: transportation costs. When petrol and diesel prices increase, the truck fare increases. This directly
affects the price of pulses. Therefore, stock the pulses now.
The third item is sugar. Whether it's tea or sweet dishes, the price of sugar is likely to double. The cost of sugar production has
increased due to the required machinery and fuel expensiveness, so buy sugar now.
The fourth important thing is fuel. It includes petrol, diesel, gas, and CNG. At the international level, crude oil prices have flared up
with war news. If petrol becomes expensive, then every item in the world becomes expensive. Therefore, fill up your car tanks now
and book your gas cylinder on time.

During wartime, the value of money decreases, and the value of gold increases. According to experts, by 2026, the price of gold
could cross the 2 lakh rupee mark. If you are considering investing or buying gold for the wedding season, this is the perfect time.
You might wonder what this has to do with war, but remember, during wartime, satellite and communication companies face stress.
Telecom companies are likely to make their plans expensive, so it's better to have your recharge done for the long term.
Now, the items that are at number 8, 9, and 10 will be the most terribly expensive. These items are such that the entire household
runs on them: medicines, dairy products, and wheat flour. Wheat and flour. Due to the disruption of the supply chain, the prices of
flour will skyrocket. Medicines—raw ingredients of many medicines come from outside. If they are stopped, medicines will become
expensive. Spices, spices that enhance the taste of food, are also for import and export.

Domestic gas cylinders will not be available. Now, the entire state of Maharashtra is experiencing a shortage of domestic gas,
natural gas, and commercial gas cylinders. Further, distributors have less gas stock, so this decision has been taken. Has India's gas
stock run out? Now, gas cylinders will not be available in these districts. Very terrible news has come to light regarding cylinders. A
situation has arisen where gas cylinders will be completely stopped from tomorrow midnight. You must be shocked to hear that a
state of emergency will be imposed across the country, but now is the time to be cautious. A very terrible update has come to light
regarding gas cylinders, which has caused a stir throughout Maharashtra and the country. Stop today's video wherever you are and
take out exactly 2 minutes to watch it completely, because the news that has come out today will make the ground slip from under
your feet. Have you ever thought about how you would make tea, cook, or feed your children if you woke up tomorrow morning and
ran out of gas in your house? Look, such a terrible blow from the America-Iran war has now come to our India, and consequently, it
has affected ordinary household gas cylinder owners like you and me, leading to chaos everywhere. Kilometer-long queues have
started outside gas agencies from now on. People are crippled and running around, but getting gas has become difficult now. But
wait, don't panic, but don't be careless either. Gas in the entire Maharashtra will not be shut down at once. From tomorrow, gas
supply will be stopped only in certain districts, and after that, gas will be stopped in other parts in two days. So, is your village, your
district in this? Will gas come to your house tomorrow or not? Even after paying your due, why won't you get a cylinder? What are
the answers to all these questions, and what are those five terrible rules implemented by the government? We are going to see in
detail in this video today. If you don't watch this video till the end, you may suffer a great loss, and tomorrow you may have to cook
on a stove. Now you might say, man, there's a war happening in America and chaos in Iran, what does that have to do with the gas
in our house? So listen carefully. India is not self-sufficient in terms of gas. LPG gas is not grown in the fields of our country, nor do
we have large reserves for it. India imports more than 60% of its total required gas from abroad, especially from the Gulf countries.
This includes Iran, Iraq, Saudi Arabia, and America. But now it has happened that Iran has a sea route called the Strait of Hormuz,
from where 20 to 30% of the world's gas and crude oil are transported. Why? Because Iran says that India is not supporting them in
this war. Because of this, the gas ships coming to India are now stuck in the sea. As the shortage increases, so does the fear. You
might remember when the Russia and Ukraine war happened, how the prices of petrol and diesel were skyrocketing, and there
were queues. But the current situation is 10 times more terrible than that. The gas coming from Russia was cheap, but now that
Iran has blocked that route, experts have predicted that the situation will remain similarly dire for the next three months. Do you
know what the result of this has been? If you had seen the scene outside the gas agencies of Mumbai, Pune, or Nashik this morning,
you would have gotten goosebumps. Since 4 o'clock in the morning, people have been standing in queues of 5-5 kilometers. In
Solapur, the situation became so serious that police had to be deployed for gas distribution. In Nagpur, angry people have stopped
gas trucks, while in Delhi, there is literally a stampede. People have only one fear in their minds: if we don't get gas today, will we
remain hungry tomorrow? Now, the most important point. The government has implemented five very strict and terrible rules to
handle this situation and to prevent the black market of gas. If you don't know these rules, your booking may be canceled. The first
rule that has changed, see how it used to be before: once the gas ran out, we would book another gas within 48 hours or
immediately. But now, according to the new rules, once you get a gas cylinder, you won't be able to book another one for the next
25 days. If your family is large and the gas runs out in 15 days, then for the next 10 days, you will have to cook on wood or coal.
The government has set this limit to save gas. The second rule is very strict, in which the government has now implemented the
Essential Commodity Act, that is, the Essential Commodity Act. This means that if anyone stores a gas cylinder or tries to sell it at a
higher price, a black market, then they will be directly imprisoned and will not get bail. This is such a strict rule. Due to the third
rule, 80% of people will have a problem, that is, many of you may not have done KYC yet. Orders have been given to immediately
stop the gas connection of people whose KYC is incomplete or who have more than one connection in their name. Therefore, if you
want to keep your gas running, check these documents carefully. The fourth rule is important for gas consumers, which is that now
everyone will not get as many cylinders as they need. In areas where there is more scarcity, the gas quota will be determined in the
same way as the grain is available on the ration card. If you don't have a ration card or it's not updated, you will face significant
difficulty in getting gas. The fifth rule is checking. This rule is very important for housewives. Now, the person who delivers gas can
come to your house and inspect. He will see whether you are using gas only for domestic cooking or using it to do some domestic
business. If you are found doing professional work on domestic gas, then your connection will be permanently canceled. Now you
will be confused about which district will have gas closed, so listen. Initially, the government focused on major cities like Mumbai,
Pune, Thane, Nashik, and Palghar, because the population is high here and the demand is immense. From tomorrow midnight, gas
supply will be disrupted for the people in this area who have not done KYC. The hotel owners have been hit the hardest by this. Blue
commercial cylinders have become unavailable, so half of the hotels are now on the verge of closing. If this situation does not
improve, then the same rationing system will be implemented throughout Maharashtra for domestic gas as well. Keep in mind, even
if you have lakhs of rupees in the bank, it is of no use; if there is no gas reserve, you will not get anything even by paying money.
There is a discussion on social media that India's gas is completely finished. The government says don't worry, there is a stock, but
the situation on the ground is different. Whenever the government says don't worry, more fear arises among the people. Just like it
happened with petrol in the middle, similarly, there is a high probability of it happening with gas now. Friends, after listening to the
five rules mentioned above, you might think that these are just rules on paper, but that's not the case. The situation is different at
the ground level. Now the main question arises, what exactly should the common man do? Actually, if there is really a gas shortage,
then what? We will go back to the era of the stove. Look, the government is saying don't worry, the stock is sufficient, but on the
other hand, gas agency people are saying that the supply has decreased from above. Instead of finding out what the truth is in this,
it is more important to see how safe we can keep ourselves. Now remember, listen carefully, what do you need to do to avoid this
situation? First thing, complete your e-KYC process today. And sometimes we procrastinate, but if your information is not updated,
it won't take long for your connection to get blocked. The second thing is, use gas.

Recently, a heart-wrenching incident occurred in a corner of Maharashtra. In a small village, a woman selling utensils was

shiny plastic tubs, steel plates, and brightly lit pans. Seeing this sparkling pot, as usual, all the women in the street flocked
together. Taking the old, old, fallen hair stored in the house, all the women gathered there. Giving hair to that pot-maker woman,
each one took their favorite pot into their lap. Someone took a big pot, someone took a pan for the vegetable, while someone
enthusiastically took spoons. But the poor, innocent women didn't know that out of this greed of 2 minutes, they had brought such
a crisis into their lives with their own hands that the whole of Maharashtra was about to be shaken.
In a quiet and serene village in the soil of Maharashtra, a recent event has occurred that has compelled not only that village but the
entire state to think. On one hand, there is the progress of science, and on the other hand, some habits that have been passed
down through tradition. When a mysterious event occurs at the confluence of these two, the ground beneath the feet of a simple,
straightforward person cannot help but slip. That day, it was afternoon. As the sun was scorching, a familiar voice echoed from the
village courtyard. A woman sitting on a bicycle, whose back and both sides of the bicycle were as if laden with mountains of
utensils. A new steel pot, shiny pans, and colorful plastic items. The way to get all this was very easy. Just give the fallen hair from
the house and take this glory home. This is a moment of joy for the women in the village. If the hair that goes into the garbage is
given a new pot, then what is wrong with that? Thinking the same, the women flocked.
In this crowd, there was a woman named Ratna. Ratna is a very hardworking and simple housewife. She also gave the saleswoman
two handfuls of hair that she had been preserving for many days, and in return, she bought a beautiful, bright, sparkling steel pot.
Ratna brought that pot home. In a fit of joy, she washed it clean and cooked vegetables in it for dinner. That night, while eating, a
different experience came. The taste of the vegetable was very different and more delicious than usual. Ratna's husband and

The truth of Dada's accident was finally revealed, and the mastermind was finally caught. After almost a month, a big success in
the investigation. A different name came up in the CID's investigation, which has shocked Maharashtra the most. The biggest news
came out regarding Ajit Dada's accident when the mastermind turned out to be someone else. After Dada's death, the entire
Maharashtra was in tears. The sudden accident gave Maharashtra its first major shock, but when a name came up in the CID
investigation, Maharashtra was shocked for the second time. The transformation of tears in people's eyes has now turned into
anger. A big name has come into discussion that no one would have even thought of. No one even dreamed that a person close to
Dada's Ambi could plot such a conspiracy. Now all the evidence has been found, what was shown on TV was false, and the truth
turned out to be something else. Until yesterday, there was a report on how Dada's plane crashed. In that report, five such shocking
things were said that completely changed the picture of this accident. In this, the timing of the plane, the time of the accident, and
the place of the accident were also changed. Actually, the needle of suspicion turned towards one name there, but when this
mastermind was taken into custody, it is said that the whole truth was revealed. Because the truth was being suppressed, and
finally, that truth has come to light. The whole world knows what happened on January 28th, and there's also a report about what
time the plane took off and where it crashed. Because the first impact of the plane was that the report stated that it did not crash in
Baramati, but somewhere else. The location changed, the time changed, and while all this was happening, the entire game of the
27th came to light in the CID's investigation. Note that everyone knows what happened on the 28th. Everyone watched it on TV, but
no one knew about the game plan that happened on the night of the 27th, and that plan has finally come to light. Finally, it is now
being said that the CID has found the mastermind from the underworld. Everyone knows the reality of January 28, but no one knew
what cooked in Mumbai the day before, that is, on January 27. No one even had a simple clue as to what conspiracy was hatched in
Mumbai, but now all the information has been revealed. In this major investigation, for the first time, two extremely secret and
shocking things about this accident came to light, which were concealed. The first thing is, what exactly happened in those 24
hours of January 27th? How was the planning done, and who is the director whose name is now being taken? How the trap was set
has become clear. That means the complete game plan for the 27th has been revealed, which will make the ground slip from under
your feet when you hear it. Because we knew what happened on the 28th, but who knew what happened on the 27th? The
minute-by-minute report of the 27th has now come into our hands, from which you will understand how this conspiracy was
hatched. But the second important point is that when this accident happened, a person was present there, and he had shot a video
after the accident. He had taken that video directly from the scene, and it fell into the hands of a channel. That video was about to
be destroyed when a daring person broadcasted it on TV, and the whole of Maharashtra was exposed to the truth. Then who was
behind their death? Who is the real mastermind of this accident? On whose orders was this contract given? Such questions are now
being asked. What was the plan for the 27th? What was it about that video that made him try to destroy it? Why did the person who
reached there immediately after the accident, what he captured in his camera, come to light today? What big name came to light
that Maharashtra was shaken to hear? It has come to light that the criminal will now face severe punishment. Look, it has been
more than a month since Dada's death. What should not have happened in so many days has happened in just a few hours. This
happened due to a firm decision of the system. The order given by him was valuable, and the investigation team followed it, and
finally, after investigation, the whole of Maharashtra understood the truth that was in the glove until today. What didn't happen in
15-20 days happened with an order. Finally, it is said that the mastermind of this case has been revealed. Then how could this
accident conspiracy have been hatched? Was it really an accident or a cold-blooded murder? All things are clear because the raw
receipt of the 27th has come out, and that new video has also been found. Initially, it was said that the accident was caused by a
technical malfunction or a mistake by the pilot. Saying this, an attempt was made to convince people, but the public was not
satisfied. When the news of Dada's death came on TV, people were greatly shocked. They were saying this is not possible, and from
there the suspicion started. On the 29th, Dada's last rites were performed, and his ashes were immersed. But since then, rumors
were deliberately spread that Dada is alive and will return because the original truth was to be hidden. Was this accident really
planned? Who was responsible for Dada's death? But false news was being used to mislead people so that attention would be
diverted from the original topic. But when new evidence was found, the topic of the 27th came to light, and the video came to light,
then the needle of suspicion turned towards a big name. Everything is now becoming clear, but finally, a strict step was taken. After
the CID was summoned, such an investigation was conducted that the entire Maharashtra was astonished. All discussions until
yesterday have now stopped because two main things have come to light. Firstly, what exactly happened on the night of the 27th,
and that video in which the truth of the accident is hidden. The most important thing is that the explanation given that the pilot did
not see the runway now seems suspicious. The roots of the accident that occurred on the 28th are hidden on the 27th itself. Upon
realizing this, the mystery began to unfold. The first secret thing is that the complete sequence of events of the 27th came to light.
The CID started a thorough investigation. Why did they investigate on the 27th? Because Rohit Pawar had also presented the
events of the 27th in his presentation, and therefore all suspicion fell on that day. On the 27th, two important events happened.
The first is that Dada was at his home in Mumbai, and the second is that when the plane stopped at the airport, something
suspicious happened there. We are watching what is the connection of these things to the accident, but the second important thing
is that video which was from the day of the accident. All the videos were coming to the forefront, but the special video that one
person had taken on their mobile was found on a news channel. Since it was published before it was destroyed, the whole picture
became clear. We know what happened on the 28th, but no one knew which secret meetings took place on the night of January
27th. The CID has brought the main accused's name to light based on three important things. That evening of January 27th, a
crowd of workers had gathered at the Devgiri bungalow in Mumbai. Dada was more serious than usual. According to a colleague,
Dada had completed all the work on time. He had told the driver that we have to go to Pune by car tomorrow at 5 AM. Check the
car properly. Dada liked road travel because he could communicate directly with people. The driver had completed all the
preparations. Everything was going well, but as they say, destiny has something different in its mind. Around 10 o'clock at night, as
Dada was going into the room, his phone rang, and the mystery increased from here. Whose phone it was is still a mystery, but a
security guard there saw that Dada's face had descended after the phone. The leader who was quiet suddenly became restless. In
that 15-minute conversation, Dada's voice was sometimes loud and sometimes serious. Why such a hurry? Let's talk after arriving.
These words came out of Dada's mouth, but perhaps the person in front had some pressure that Dada had to change his decision.
As soon as he hung up the phone, he called a senior secretary. The topic was a specific file. Which file was it during the election
period that made Dada so upset? That time of midnight, the area of the ministry is quiet, but something was being cooked on the
seventh floor. This is the darkest part of the investigation. In the CCTV, a person with a face was seen searching for something in

the record room. Over there, Dada was uneasy at Devgiri. A message came that the file was lost in the ministry. We were supposed
to leave by car in the morning, but the file was stopped on purpose. When the file was found, it was 4:00 AM. The safe timing of the
road journey was systematically missed. This was not just a file, but the first move of that big conspiracy. The one who caught Dada
in the web of time, and there was no option but the path of the sky. When the roads on the ground were blocked, fate hanged the
plane. The plane was booked. Rohit Pawar had shown the booking time and procedure, but the game that took place at the airport
on the night of the 27th has now been revealed. Here, Dada was waiting for the file, and there, some unknown faces were circling
around the plane at the airport. The technical mistakes that Rohit Pawar has pointed out are now making a home for themselves.
Friends, whatever you have heard or seen so far was truly a big iceberg. And after Dada's death, Maharashtra became empty, but
only one question was constantly swirling in our minds, was it really an accident or a conspiracy hatched with a cold mind? Today,
after listening to the CID investigation, whose body should we take out? On that night of January 27th. What exactly happened with
the ministry? Think about who exactly had that file, and why it suddenly disappeared. Who suddenly forced the person who liked to
travel by road to decide to go by plane? Whose phone call was it at midnight that made Dada uneasy? The biggest suspicion is on
the person named Ramesh, the face wearing a garland around the airport plane, and the large amount deposited in his account. All
these coincidences must not have happened. It's easy to say technical malfunction, but treating a transporter as faulty and
tampering with fuel seems like a sign of a technical malfunction. But I want to ask you one thing, what do you think, is this file
disappearing, missing the travel time, and the plane malfunctioning at the last minute, all at the same time? How can this happen?
Could it really be the hand of a big leader? Or was it a trap set by someone close to Dada? Please share your opinion in the
comment box because until the general public asks questions, the truth will not come out in such big cases. Maharashtra is waiting
for an answer today. Remember, I am only discussing the possibilities and issues at hand here. Our aim is not to defame anyone,
but to stand with justice. We will keep bringing you every update on this matter. The truth does not remain hidden. Jai Maharashtra.

India's gas is finished. Gas cylinders will stop being available from midnight today, and a state of emergency will be imposed in the

which has caused a stir throughout the country. The shortage of gas has increased to such a terrible extent that the government
has implemented strict rules on gas cylinders, due to which gas cylinders will no longer be available here. Look, the gas cylinder
that is burning in your house might be the last one now. Keep in mind, even if you have thousands of rupees in your pocket, you
might have lakhs of rupees in the bank, but even after paying money, you will not get a gas cylinder. Because from midnight today,
the central government is going to implement five strict and very terrible rules regarding gas cylinders, due to which you will not
get a gas cylinder even after paying money. Look, as you know, commercial gas cylinders, meaning those used by hotel owners,
were introduced just two days ago. 
Now, the very first point: the audience might be feeling, how did the gas cylinder end? How did the gas stop? How can the gas in
India end like this? So look, keep one thing in mind. You might be wondering, what is the connection between a gas cylinder and
war? So keep this in mind: the LPG we use is not produced in the fields of our country. India imports more than 60% of its gas from
foreign countries, mainly from the Gulf countries. Currently, the first explosion of the war that has taken place in the Middle East
has occurred in our kitchens. The conflict between America, Iran, and Israel has stopped the pace of the world. Iran has blocked the
Strait of Hormuz sea route. This is the same route from where ships carrying gas from Qatar and other countries come to India.
Now, warships are standing on this route. Iran has signaled that not a single ship will go further from here. This means that the gas
ships coming to India are stuck in the sea. Now, that is, the shortage of gas cylinders in India that was there until now, the
possibility of it doubling or tripling has now increased, and therefore the government has further... 
Now listen carefully, because these are the rules that will decide whether food will be cooked at your home today or not. Rule one:
change in booking, 25 days gap. Previously, you could order another cylinder in 48 hours once one was finished, but now, according

Extremely urgent notice for all citizens of the state. Due to the war between Iran, Israel, and America, the prices of these 10 items
will increase fourfold in 72 hours. There was a stir throughout the state when the new prices of these 10 items were announced

become four times more expensive. These 10 items are such that even the leaf in the house cannot move without them. Without
them, an atom cannot survive. Such extremely important 10 items are going to become terribly expensive. The common man's
pocket will be cut open.

another major increase in this, which is currently being observed. If we consider the past year, the price of edible oil has already
increased by 30%. So now, there is a fear that this increase will be four times greater. Now, at exactly how many rupees will the
price of edible oil increase? Now, I am going to tell you this important point. Look. Any edible oil, be it groundnut oil, sunflower oil,
or any other oil, is made from palm oil. And palm oil is obtained from foreign countries, and Iranian attacks have started on these
very oil sources. Because of this, a shortage of palm oil is now being felt, and if that shortage is felt, oil will not be produced in the
market. And if oil is not produced, then the demand is high and the supply is low. When such a situation arises for an item or its
price increases, this is a stone-like situation. 
The second item is lentils and pulses. Lentils have unique importance in our diet, but there is a fear of a large increase in their
prices. Now, the price of lentils and pulses will increase significantly, but there won't be much change in it. But perhaps due to the

prices of the third item are higher. It will make a huge difference, but the most terrible thing is item number 8, 9, and 10, which will
cause a very big problem for those items. 
The third item is sugar. Whether it's tea or a sweet dish, since the price of sugar is likely to double, buy it in advance. Because the
fuels required to make sugar have increased drastically, which can make the sugar issue very difficult. Now, the fourth thing, which
has a direct impact, is due to war, and that terrible thing is the fourth thing, which is fuel. Fuel includes petrol, diesel, and gas, all

can be a significant increase in fuel prices, which will affect transportation and consequently the prices of all goods. If possible, fill
your vehicle tank completely now. 
Also, a big surge will be seen in the prices of gold and silver. According to experts, by 2026, the price of gold can cross the 2 lakh
rupee mark. Along with this, mobile recharge prices will also increase, which will increase your monthly expenses. Viewers, this was
the list of potential inflation. Experts advise that items that do not spoil, such as oil, sugar, and pulses, should be stored for two to
three months. It would be wise to store grains like wheat, sorghum, and millet for six months. 
Friends, so far we have seen the list of these 10 items, but it is very important to understand one thing here. This video is not to
scare you, but to alert you. Currently, there are many news circulating on social media that prices will increase fourfold in 72 hours,
but in reality, the international market does not collapse so quickly. Yes, crude oil prices increase due to the war. Its effect depends
on transportation, and consequently, inflation increases, but increasing the price fourfold is a definite possibility. Therefore, don't
panic and rush to the store today, because this crowd of yours creates artificial scarcity, and shopkeepers start selling goods at
high prices. We should avoid panic buying as aware citizens. 
Now, what exactly is the main point to do? According to experts, smart planning should be done when there are months of
instability at the global level.

D-Mart's biggest scam revealed. Those who are buying goods from D-Mart, beware. A person working at D-Mart made a secret

because they save a lot are cut off. Until today, people think, "We are very smart, we buy cheap goods, we save thousands of
rupees," but stop there. This could be the biggest mistake of your life. Today, in D-Mart, an employee who has been working for the
last five years has revealed some secrets that will make the ground slip from under your feet. That employee says, "We do not sell
cheap goods to customers, but we program them to spend. This is not just a business, but a terrifying web. The moment you enter
that shop, your mind doesn't stay with you." 
Five types mentioned by the employee are such that customers are cheated in these five ways. More money is taken out of the
customers' pockets. The first method is such that, in which the second method is such that customers have a bill of more than
₹500,000. Then the fifth method is so terrible that, through which, customers' ₹5,000 to ₹10,000 are spent more. All methods are
used in the case of these customers, but those customers do not know. 
Now, first of all, we are going to see the first method, that is, how more money is withdrawn from customers in this D-Mart. Now,
first of all, we enter through the gate, and as soon as we enter the gate, the real game begins. First method: what comes in front of
your eyes as soon as you enter through the gate? Sugar sacks, oil cans, or a mountain of biscuits. There, in large letters, it would be
written, "₹40 outside, here only ₹36." Immediately, a thought comes to your mind, "Wow, ₹4 saved." But friends, this is the first
step of your deception. The employee says that we deliberately break the prices of some items whose value is known to everyone.
Suppose a cook knows that a packet of tea leaves from a specific brand costs ₹50. In D-Mart, it is sold for ₹48. Now, a belief takes
root in that mother's mind that everything here must be cheap. On the strength of this belief, she then buys thousands of rupees
worth of things whose prices she doesn't even know. This employee says that because of this saving of ₹1-₹2, your brain stops
doing calculations. You are so enthusiastic that you pick up unnecessary things. This seems like a small trick of just ₹100-₹200, but
this is your first preparation to hunt. 
Now, the intensity of this type is much greater than before. Have you ever wondered why you have to go to the very end to get the
thing you need every day, like lentils, rice, or salt? The employee says, "We deliberately make the shop's layout in such a way that
the customer has to walk at least half a kilometer. Imagine you have only gone to buy 1 kg of sugar; sugar is in the farthest corner.
Until you get there, you have to go through 10 rows where fragrant incense sticks, shiny curtains, new types of clothes, and shiny
utensils are arranged. You are walking towards the sugar, but your attention goes to a buy-one-get-one bedsheet. You say, 'Oh, the
bedsheet at home has become old, let's buy it.' As you move forward, you see fancy glass glasses. You don't need it, but you pick it
up for just ₹99. By the time you reach the sugar, your small basket is half full." 
The employee says, "We deliberately widen the roads so that two trolleys get stuck together and you have to stop. The more time
you wait, the more items you will see and buy. Here, you are getting a straight fraud of ₹500 to ₹1000." 
The third type is something that will ruin your budget. We have firmly instilled one thing in the minds of customers: what is big is
cheap. You went to buy shampoo; there is a small shampoo, and next to it, there is a big jumbo family pack. It says "50% extra" or
"super saver pack" on it. We close our eyes and pick up that big box, but here the employee secretly says, "Often the price of that
big box is more than the small packet. Suppose a 100-gram biscuit costs ₹10, meaning ₹1 for 10 grams, but a larger packet costs
₹50 and weighs 450 grams. We hastily look at ₹50 but don't consider the weight. Here, you are unnecessarily losing ₹5." 
This was about money, but the second disadvantage is usage. When a 2 kg oil can comes into the house, we use oil fearlessly.
When there is a small container, we use it carefully, meaning D-Mart increases your usage by giving you more goods so that you
finish quickly and come back to them. This fraud costs you ₹1500 to ₹2000 per month. 
The fourth type is a test of your patience. You come to the billing counter after buying for an hour and getting tired; there is already
a big queue there. Standing in this queue is also part of their plan. We deliberately arrange chocolates, chewing gum, small toffees,
and small toys near the counter, which will be in the hands of your children. Think about it, you are tired, your child is also bored.
That child is shouting in the queue and asking for the chocolate that is visible in front. You pick up two-three chocolates and put
them in the trolley so that you can be quiet at that time. But the fun is ahead; there are some things that we don't need at all. For
example, battery cells, hand sanitizer, or lip balm. When standing in a queue, we have free time. We casually look and think, "Oh,
the sales must be over, they will be needed sometime," so we pick them up. The employee says that sitting in this queue, we buy
hundreds of rupees worth of items from customers who don't even have a simple entry in their list. Here, you get an emotional loot
of ₹800 to ₹1000. 
Now comes the fifth type, about which the employee literally started crying while speaking. This fraud can ruin your ₹5000 to
₹10,000. After hearing this information, you will think 10 times before going to D-Mart next time. That employee says, "Customers,
have you ever considered private labeling or brand copying? In D-Mart, there are many items whose names you have never heard,
but they look like big brands. For example, D-Mart Select salt looks just like Tata Meets. You might wonder what to name the brand?
Salt is salt. But the employee says that the raw material used to make these cheap items is extremely inferior. The employee says
that we often order such batches whose weight is less than the outside market. If there is 30 grams of goods in 10 rupees wafers
outside, then here in a packet made by placing a special order, there is only 25 grams of goods. You don't understand the
difference of 5 grams, but D-Mart earns crores of rupees by cutting these 5-5 grams from millions of customers. Have you ever
checked the bill? The employee says that many times the price on the shelf, that is, in the cupboard, is different and different in the
scanner. You are in a hurry." 
So friends, what that employee was saying is truly terrible. It seems like we are smart, but in reality, we are trapped in their web. I

Friends, so far, the things we have heard, but before this video ends, I want to talk to you about something important. Look,

Congratulations if you have a son. The parents of the children will receive ₹54,000. The Maharashtra government has launched a
special, explosive scheme for children. Now, if you have one or two children, you will get a benefit of ₹54,000. The fate of all
parents in Maharashtra was brightened when the Chief Minister announced this new scheme for children. Applications for this have
also started. The distribution of money is also starting immediately. Now, even if your son is studying in first grade, second grade,
or even if he has completed 18 years, this entire amount will be deposited in the parents' bank account. The government has
indeed taken this revolutionary decision especially for children. Previously, all schemes were for girls, but in the 2026 budget, the
government has decided to create a special scheme for children. Now, under this scheme, each child will receive ₹2,250 per month,
which is ₹27,000 per year, for each child. And the parents who have two children will receive a total of ₹54,000, with one child
receiving ₹27,000 and the other child receiving ₹27,000. You can see that the Ministry of Women and Child Development has also
started its form. Look closely, this is called Bal Sangopan Yojana. Look, this is the application that you have to fill and attach seven
important documents with it, and directly in your account, the installment for the future of children will start coming every month.
The Chief Minister of the state, Devendra Fadnavis, has announced this big decision. The scheme was announced just two days ago.
Now, I am going to tell you in detail how to fill out the application for this scheme, how the money comes into the account, and
which seven documents to attach. Look, this scheme is such that its news has not come to any TV nor has it come to social media.
Because this scheme was announced very late in the budget, this scheme did not get much publicity. But we are making this
informative video to give this information to every parent through our video. In the video, we are going to tell you all the detailed
information. But keep in mind the first point, this money will be given to every child in different ways. Now, if your son is born, then
I will definitely tell you how to fill out the form, but the most important point is the bank account, because a special bank account is
required for this. If you don't have that bank account, then even if you fill the form properly and become eligible, your child's money
may not come into your account. I will explain the process from the beginning to the start of filling out the form and all the
documents in a very simple language in this video. Look, the scheme is new, so no one knows about it yet. The registration has just
started. Those who apply first will get the money immediately. Look, if you don't believe it, then see this. If you think this
information is false, then pay close attention. This is the official website of the Wardha Zilla Parishad. The Bal Sangopan Yojana is
clearly given on this portal. All the details of the scheme, the required documents, everything is officially presented here. Because it
is registered on the government website, this scheme is 100% true and its payment has also started. Now it is proven that the
scheme is official. I have also shown you on the Zilla Parishad website. Now let's see how to fill the application, what are the seven
documents, and how to earn money every month according to the children's accounts. Now look carefully at how to fill the form.
You can see on the screen, this is the official form of the Women and Child Development Department. I will definitely give you the
link from where to download this application. You have to print this paper and submit it to the office. What to write in the
application, how to fill the form without mistakes, where to fill the information, from where to submit the documents, and most
importantly, I am going to tell you a special secret tip that your child will definitely get 100% of the money. Because even if a small
mistake happens while filling the form, you will not get the money for this big scheme. Therefore, understand this information
properly. So look, this is the application for the child care scheme, through which each child will get ₹2,250 per month. ₹2,250
means ₹27,000 per year, and since benefits are available to two children, ₹27,000 + ₹27,000 = ₹54,000 you will get per year. This
is the same form for the Women and Child Development Department that you need to fill out completely. You can read the name of
the scheme above, Bal Sangopan Yojana. Now we will discuss in detail, but let's quickly understand this process. The documents
required to earn money, terms and conditions, rules, and who exactly can apply, for which children is this scheme? Look, now the
year 2024 has started, so this is a big festival for all the parents in the state, for mothers and sisters who have a son. So look, let's
learn the complete method of earning this wealth. First of all, how does a child get ₹2,250 per month, which is ₹27,000 per year?
Where to register? What documents are required? Let's get information on which family is eligible. This is a government scheme for
the bright future of children, in which it is very important for the age of the child to be between zero and 18 years. That means this
scheme is for children under 18 years of age. Now, the money that was previously received under the child care scheme was only
₹1,800. It has now been increased to ₹2,250 directly. Seeing the increasing inflation, the government has made this big change.
Now, how do you get this money? This benefit used to be available in cash, but now the government sends money directly to the
bank account through DBT, which means Direct Benefit Transfer. For this, a joint account is required in the name of the child and
the parent. Even if the child has a minor account, this scheme can be availed. Now, exactly which parents and which children
receive this money, what needs to be done to get the money into the account, I will tell you all of that. But before that, write down
the documents required before applying, because there are a few more documents and it may take time to collect them, and there
is a fear of the deadline expiring by then. So, look at the documents required for the child care scheme. Parent's Aadhaar card,
child's parents' Aadhaar, child's birth certificate or school bonafide, Aadhaar card proof of address, if unfortunately there are no
parents, then their death certificate. Family income certificate, photo of the entire family, disability certificate and photo if the boy
is disabled. Parent's bank or post passbook and most importantly, proof that the boy is under 18 years of age. If you do not have
other proofs, then electricity bill, house tax or water tax proof will also work. But don't forget the Tahsildar's income certificate. This
is how you need to keep these documents ready. Now pay close attention to the application. Here is a form for Women and Child
Development Department, Maharashtra State Child Care. In the application, write the child's full name, address, date of birth, caste,
religion, and which class they are studying in, according to the bonafide. Then fill in the parent's name, address, mobile number,
the child's family situation, and income information. Is it farming or business? What do you need the money for? Write all of this
clearly. Re-check the list of documents given below the application. Income certificate, Aadhaar card Xerox, family photo, bonafide,
residence certificate, death certificate, passbook and disability certificate if required. Now you have seen this form, but listen
carefully to who this scheme is exactly for. Orphaned children or children whose parents or one of the two has passed away are
eligible for this scheme. See, this financial assistance is for children who are destitute or whose parents' shelter has been lost. Now,
what is the second category? It is for children whose parents have passed away during the Corona period, who have only one
parent, single parent, who have divorced or are living separately, who have been abandoned by their parents, or whose parents are
in the hospital due to serious illness. Also, this scheme is for the future of children of lepers or prisoners suffering from confinement,
mentally challenged children, HIV-affected children, or children who were working as child laborers. This application can be filled for
children of parents whose financial condition is very needy and very poor. Those whose situation is difficult should definitely fill out
this form for the bright future of their children. Now, fill out this form completely and submit it to the office of your nearest Women
and Child Development Department. You can inquire by going to the office in your taluka or district. Contact there, and if there is

any orphan child around you, a single parent's son, or a family in trouble, then definitely share this video with them. So that needy
people can apply in time and avail the benefits of this scheme. This form will be easily available to you at your nearest government
office. I have shown you its eligibility and sample. Until now, we have seen what this scheme is and what documents are required,
but now the most important part is the practical steps. I am now going to tell you such things that you will not hear anywhere else
because many parents make these mistakes while filling out the form and then their applications get rejected. First step, see the
secret tip while filling out the form. When you go to submit this application to the Women and Child Development Department
office, there is a waiting list, which means a waiting list. While submitting the application, keep one thing in mind: don't forget to
provide your current mobile number along with the application. Often, government officials try to contact you, but the process stops
because the number is switched off. The second thing is a joint bank account. If you don't have a joint account with your son, go to
the bank today and open it. A post office account is excellent because money from government schemes is deposited more quickly
and without any hassle into the post office account. The second step is income certificate and age limit. Many parents feel that the
income certificate is old, but keep in mind that according to this new update of 2026, your income certificate is current annual. It
must be of the current financial year. If it is old, then your application will be rejected in the same place, and even if one day is left
for the home loan to complete 18 years, you are eligible, but keep in mind that this honorarium stops as soon as 18 years are
completed. Third step, where exactly to submit the application? If you are wondering where the office is, then look. It is at the
District Women and Child Development Officer's office in the district. If it is not possible for you to go there, then contact the
Integrated Child Development Service Scheme office or Anganwadi worker in the taluka. They have the forms available for this
scheme and they can help you with the next steps. A request, friends, this scheme is only for you. It is not for your son, but it is for
those children who need support. If there is anyone around you whose parents are no longer in this world, or whose family is
spending their days in poverty, then definitely share this video with them. The information you have shared can change the life of
an orphaned child. It can give them a new direction in education. Now what to do? First of all, download the application form from
the link given in the description. Submit all seven documents mentioned above in a file today. In the next four days, go to your
nearest office and submit the application. If you are facing any difficulties or if you didn't understand something while filling out the
form, then definitely ask in the comments below. I will try to answer your questions myself, and yes. To get information about such
important government schemes on time, subscribe to our channel now and press the bell icon next to it. So let's meet in such an
informative video. Until then, take care of your children. Jai Hind, Jai Maharashtra.
