Dada is alive. Dada was not dead; he was kidnapped. Ajit Dada has directly called Sharad Pawar. Yes, this is true. You might not
believe it, but CID has a video. In this video, a person is firmly saying that Dada is not dead, Dada is safe. Where exactly is Dada,
and who and where has he been hidden? All this has now come to light. A viral video went massively viral two days ago. Finally, CID
found the person who was speaking in that viral video, and after thoroughly investigating it, the whole truth came out. Sharad
Pawar received a phone call. What exactly was said on the phone? Until yesterday, no one could believe it. Everyone thought Dada
had left forever, but after a full month, suddenly a video comes out, and the person in it speaks with such certainty that even the
investigation agencies are shocked. That person is clearly saying that Dada contacted his own uncle, Sharad Pawar, from a secret
location. When this CID video became famous, the investigation really picked up pace, and Dada's secret started to come out. 
On one hand, while the entire Maharashtra was drowned in sorrow, everyone wondered how this man could say this with such
confidence. But finally, the real truth behind it came out. Really? So, is Dada alive? What exactly did he call Sharad Pawar? What
discussion took place on the phone? And how exactly did this man understand this secret? The answers to all these questions are
now revealed. After this video became popular, the investigating agencies immediately turned the tables and took this person into
custody. When the CID thoroughly investigated him, after hearing what he said, even the police officers themselves lost their
ground. Now, what exactly did this person see? To understand exactly how Dada's call went, we will have to go back two days. 
In Maharashtra, Dada's accident was completed a month ago, just two-three days ago. Only after that, the government report of the
accident came forward. In this official report, there were five things about the plane crash that would shock anyone. This is
considered 100% true because it is a government report. This report sparked a wave of doubt in people's minds, and discussions
about Dada's existence began. Rohit Pawar had also shown evidence and reports of the accident in 4-5 press conferences. Until
then, the controversy of whether it was Dada's accident or sabotage had been raised. But suddenly, this video of CID getting caught
changed the whole picture. The entire state felt that Maharashtra's beloved leader was lost in the terrible plane crash that occurred
in Baramati on January 28. The whole of Maharashtra was trying to forget this sorrow, but this video once again created a
sensation. 
The claims that person made in the video raised questions about the government report as well. The first clue to this mystery came
from the first point in the report. The first point in the report was that the plane did not crash where it was said to have crashed.
Yes, you are listening correctly. The government report says that the place of the plane was changed. It was said that the plane
crashed 50 meters away from the runway, but in reality, the plane had previously crashed on a tree. So, if the place was changed,
did anyone come out of it? This doubt was strong. In that, now the video that has come to the CID, in that the person is saying that
Dada is alive and he has called Kaka. Think about it, where errors are coming out in government documents, there people are
finding it easier to trust this person's claim. The CID is now tracking this phone call. If the phone call really happened, what could
have been said? This discussion has gained momentum. 
The second shocking thing in the report is who the sixth person was. That pile of planes is still burning in the Sahyadri mountains,
but the questions that are now being asked in every corner of Maharashtra are more burning than that fire. Initially, news came that
there were five people on the plane, but when the official passenger manifest of the Airport Authority, that is, the passenger list,
came to light, the administration was shocked. There were actually six names on the list. Then the question arises that if six people
had flown, then how were only five dead bodies found in the pile? Did the sixth man disappear into the air, or did he land
somewhere before the plane crashed? The real beginning of this mysterious story starts from here. 
The scene at the accident site was heart-wrenching. The plane was so badly burnt that even the metal sheets had melted and
become like paper. In such a situation, it was impossible to identify a human body, but the investigating officers revealed that the
identity of a dead body was determined by the clock in his hand. It sounds as simple as it is suspicious. How can a leather strap or a
simple metal watch remain safe in a fire where the plane's engine has been destroyed? Was this watch deliberately placed there?
This question, asked by people on social media, has now been recorded as a major suspicion in the CID's file. 
When a very important person like the Deputy Chief Minister travels, their movements are recorded every second. According to the
Air Traffic Control records, there is a significant difference of 20 minutes between when the plane took off from Mumbai and when it
was expected to appear on the Baramati radar. The plane was technically in good condition, the weather was clear, then where
exactly was this 20-minute plane? Did the plane change its course? Or did it deceive the radar and land somewhere secret? The
calculation of this time has completely changed the direction of the investigation. 
Another shocking point in the report is that last call. According to official information, the contact was lost two minutes before the
plane crashed, but according to sources, new information is emerging that the last call was not to air traffic control but to a private
number. Whose number was that, and what happened in that conversation? If Dada had actually called one of his close relatives,
what was the location of that phone? These questions have stirred up a wave of suspicion in the minds of the common people. 
When the whole of Maharashtra was in mourning, at the same time a video of an incomprehensible person spread like wildfire. That
man was emphatically saying that Dada is alive and he has been moved to a safe place. Initially, everyone ignored him, considering
him crazy, but when the CID took that man into custody, the matter took a different turn. He said in the inquiry that he had not
seen this dream, but he had seen it in the accounts. Now what exactly is this story? What secret information does he have? CID is
now searching for the mastermind behind this man. Is this man part of a big conspiracy or someone who plays with people's
emotions, spreading rumors, is not yet clear. 
In Maharashtra's politics, Dada is not just a position, but a courage. That's why common people feel that this is not just a case of
accidental death, but there could be some terrible political conspiracy behind it. People's love and technical errors in reports have
sparked such discussions, but today's bitter truth is that Dada is not officially with us. That video could be a ray of hope in people's

The truth of Dada's accident was finally revealed, and the mastermind was finally caught. After almost a month, a big success in
the investigation. A different name came up in the CID's investigation, which has shocked Maharashtra the most. The biggest news
came out regarding Ajit Dada's accident when the mastermind turned out to be someone else. After Dada's death, the entire
Maharashtra was in tears. The sudden accident gave Maharashtra its first major shock, but when a name came up in the CID
investigation, Maharashtra was shocked for the second time. The transformation of tears in people's eyes has now turned into
anger. A big name has come into discussion that no one would have even thought of. No one even dreamed that a person close to
Dada's Ambi could plot such a conspiracy. Now all the evidence has been found, what was shown on TV was false, and the truth
turned out to be something else. Until yesterday, there was a report on how Dada's plane crashed. In that report, five such shocking
things were said that completely changed the picture of this accident. In this, the timing of the plane, the time of the accident, and
the place of the accident were also changed. Actually, the needle of suspicion turned towards one name there, but when this
mastermind was taken into custody, it is said that the whole truth was revealed. Because the truth was being suppressed, and
finally, that truth has come to light. The whole world knows what happened on January 28th, and there's also a report about what
time the plane took off and where it crashed. Because the first impact of the plane was that the report stated that it did not crash in
Baramati, but somewhere else. The location changed, the time changed, and while all this was happening, the entire game of the
27th came to light in the CID's investigation. Note that everyone knows what happened on the 28th. Everyone watched it on TV, but
no one knew about the game plan that happened on the night of the 27th, and that plan has finally come to light. Finally, it is now
being said that the CID has found the mastermind from the underworld. Everyone knows the reality of January 28, but no one knew
what cooked in Mumbai the day before, that is, on January 27. No one even had a simple clue as to what conspiracy was hatched in
Mumbai, but now all the information has been revealed. In this major investigation, for the first time, two extremely secret and
shocking things about this accident came to light, which were concealed. The first thing is, what exactly happened in those 24
hours of January 27th? How was the planning done, and who is the director whose name is now being taken? How the trap was set
has become clear. That means the complete game plan for the 27th has been revealed, which will make the ground slip from under
your feet when you hear it. Because we knew what happened on the 28th, but who knew what happened on the 27th? The
minute-by-minute report of the 27th has now come into our hands, from which you will understand how this conspiracy was
hatched. But the second important point is that when this accident happened, a person was present there, and he had shot a video
after the accident. He had taken that video directly from the scene, and it fell into the hands of a channel. That video was about to
be destroyed when a daring person broadcasted it on TV, and the whole of Maharashtra was exposed to the truth. Then who was
behind their death? Who is the real mastermind of this accident? On whose orders was this contract given? Such questions are now
being asked. What was the plan for the 27th? What was it about that video that made him try to destroy it? Why did the person who
reached there immediately after the accident, what he captured in his camera, come to light today? What big name came to light
that Maharashtra was shaken to hear? It has come to light that the criminal will now face severe punishment. Look, it has been
more than a month since Dada's death. What should not have happened in so many days has happened in just a few hours. This
happened due to a firm decision of the system. The order given by him was valuable, and the investigation team followed it, and
finally, after investigation, the whole of Maharashtra understood the truth that was in the glove until today. What didn't happen in
15-20 days happened with an order. Finally, it is said that the mastermind of this case has been revealed. Then how could this
accident conspiracy have been hatched? Was it really an accident or a cold-blooded murder? All things are clear because the raw
receipt of the 27th has come out, and that new video has also been found. Initially, it was said that the accident was caused by a
technical malfunction or a mistake by the pilot. Saying this, an attempt was made to convince people, but the public was not
satisfied. When the news of Dada's death came on TV, people were greatly shocked. They were saying this is not possible, and from
there the suspicion started. On the 29th, Dada's last rites were performed, and his ashes were immersed. But since then, rumors
were deliberately spread that Dada is alive and will return because the original truth was to be hidden. Was this accident really
planned? Who was responsible for Dada's death? But false news was being used to mislead people so that attention would be
diverted from the original topic. But when new evidence was found, the topic of the 27th came to light, and the video came to light,
then the needle of suspicion turned towards a big name. Everything is now becoming clear, but finally, a strict step was taken. After
the CID was summoned, such an investigation was conducted that the entire Maharashtra was astonished. All discussions until
yesterday have now stopped because two main things have come to light. Firstly, what exactly happened on the night of the 27th,
and that video in which the truth of the accident is hidden. The most important thing is that the explanation given that the pilot did
not see the runway now seems suspicious. The roots of the accident that occurred on the 28th are hidden on the 27th itself. Upon
realizing this, the mystery began to unfold. The first secret thing is that the complete sequence of events of the 27th came to light.
The CID started a thorough investigation. Why did they investigate on the 27th? Because Rohit Pawar had also presented the
events of the 27th in his presentation, and therefore all suspicion fell on that day. On the 27th, two important events happened.
The first is that Dada was at his home in Mumbai, and the second is that when the plane stopped at the airport, something
suspicious happened there. We are watching what is the connection of these things to the accident, but the second important thing
is that video which was from the day of the accident. All the videos were coming to the forefront, but the special video that one
person had taken on their mobile was found on a news channel. Since it was published before it was destroyed, the whole picture
became clear. We know what happened on the 28th, but no one knew which secret meetings took place on the night of January
27th. The CID has brought the main accused's name to light based on three important things. That evening of January 27th, a
crowd of workers had gathered at the Devgiri bungalow in Mumbai. Dada was more serious than usual. According to a colleague,
Dada had completed all the work on time. He had told the driver that we have to go to Pune by car tomorrow at 5 AM. Check the
car properly. Dada liked road travel because he could communicate directly with people. The driver had completed all the
preparations. Everything was going well, but as they say, destiny has something different in its mind. Around 10 o'clock at night, as
Dada was going into the room, his phone rang, and the mystery increased from here. Whose phone it was is still a mystery, but a
security guard there saw that Dada's face had descended after the phone. The leader who was quiet suddenly became restless. In
that 15-minute conversation, Dada's voice was sometimes loud and sometimes serious. Why such a hurry? Let's talk after arriving.
These words came out of Dada's mouth, but perhaps the person in front had some pressure that Dada had to change his decision.
As soon as he hung up the phone, he called a senior secretary. The topic was a specific file. Which file was it during the election
period that made Dada so upset? That time of midnight, the area of the ministry is quiet, but something was being cooked on the
seventh floor. This is the darkest part of the investigation. In the CCTV, a person with a face was seen searching for something in

the record room. Over there, Dada was uneasy at Devgiri. A message came that the file was lost in the ministry. We were supposed
to leave by car in the morning, but the file was stopped on purpose. When the file was found, it was 4:00 AM. The safe timing of the
road journey was systematically missed. This was not just a file, but the first move of that big conspiracy. The one who caught Dada
in the web of time, and there was no option but the path of the sky. When the roads on the ground were blocked, fate hanged the
plane. The plane was booked. Rohit Pawar had shown the booking time and procedure, but the game that took place at the airport
on the night of the 27th has now been revealed. Here, Dada was waiting for the file, and there, some unknown faces were circling
around the plane at the airport. The technical mistakes that Rohit Pawar has pointed out are now making a home for themselves.
Friends, whatever you have heard or seen so far was truly a big iceberg. And after Dada's death, Maharashtra became empty, but
only one question was constantly swirling in our minds, was it really an accident or a conspiracy hatched with a cold mind? Today,
after listening to the CID investigation, whose body should we take out? On that night of January 27th. What exactly happened with
the ministry? Think about who exactly had that file, and why it suddenly disappeared. Who suddenly forced the person who liked to
travel by road to decide to go by plane? Whose phone call was it at midnight that made Dada uneasy? The biggest suspicion is on
the person named Ramesh, the face wearing a garland around the airport plane, and the large amount deposited in his account. All
these coincidences must not have happened. It's easy to say technical malfunction, but treating a transporter as faulty and
tampering with fuel seems like a sign of a technical malfunction. But I want to ask you one thing, what do you think, is this file
disappearing, missing the travel time, and the plane malfunctioning at the last minute, all at the same time? How can this happen?
Could it really be the hand of a big leader? Or was it a trap set by someone close to Dada? Please share your opinion in the
comment box because until the general public asks questions, the truth will not come out in such big cases. Maharashtra is waiting
for an answer today. Remember, I am only discussing the possibilities and issues at hand here. Our aim is not to defame anyone,
but to stand with justice. We will keep bringing you every update on this matter. The truth does not remain hidden. Jai Maharashtra.

India in trade from time to time and ruined it, humiliated Indians by denying them H1B visas, and the arrogance of those who were
constantly fertilizing Pakistan was shattered to dust last midnight. This news is nowhere on TV, nor is it discussed on social media,
because this news has been suppressed in a very systematic way. But the truth does not remain hidden. In the morning, when a
video of Trump appeared on a news channel, a clever journalist became suspicious. Upon investigation, it was found that the video
was not real, but a fake video created by AI, that is, Artificial Intelligence. If Trump were alive, why was there a need to create this

possible even when America was so powerful and so far away from Iran? Now, what exactly was India's benefit in this? What deal

game is over. This is not just news, but it is a roar that has changed the center of global power. Yesterday midnight, Washington
D.C.'s heartbeat was missed when the whole world was in deep sleep. Then, something was written on a new page of history that

In that dark darkness, the impregnable White House was pierced by a very secret mission of Iran and India. When the President of

Minister Modi was heard in a very safe bunker. The message given by Iran's new top leader was only three words: The work is done.
A mysterious but victorious smile appeared on Modi's face, which would never come in front of the camera. This smile was of a
great victory, of an old revenge. The power that America had repeatedly taxed and thrown at India in trade, humiliated Indians by
denying them H1B visas, and the arrogance of those who were constantly fertilizing Pakistan was thrown to the dust yesterday at
midnight. This great act truly began on February 28th. The United States launched fierce attacks on Iran under the name of a
surgical strike. Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khomeini, who was old and old-fashioned, met his end in that attack. America and
Israel felt that Iran had now become an orphan. Iran was surrounded from all sides. From here Abu Dhabi, from there Saudi Arabia
and Qatar, all the countries were tied to America's cloak. Iran's economy was collapsing. People were on the streets, and oil
reserves were set on fire. Trump had announced victory from the White House balcony, but he did not know that Khomeini's young
son and heir to the throne was not of old thoughts. He was skilled in modern warfare. Instead of crying, he decided to fight. As soon
as he sat on the throne, he took an oath in the first hour: The blood is changed by blood. But he knew completely that directly
attacking America with a missile would mean ending his own existence. Because the distance between America and Iran is
immense. And on the way, there are hundreds of American military bases. It was difficult to even get a simple plane through there.
That's why he decided to create a team that would be more dangerous than the Navy SEALs' team created to kill Osama bin Laden.
Iran's new leader not only selected military officers but also people who had old accounts with America. This team consisted of
most-wanted people at the global level. It mainly had secret support from Russia and India. India provided significant help behind
the scenes to create this team. Although India-America relations appear positive on the surface, the Trump administration caused
immense suffering to India, sometimes by creating obstacles in trade and sometimes by supplying state-of-the-art weapons to
Pakistan. India decided not to remain silent now. By using a secret satellite of India's ISRO, every corner of the White House, every

America and Iran. American Navy aircraft carriers are stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. Iran deliberately continued its bombing

various places around the world, and it has advanced missile systems, but Alexey had released a bug in America's satellite system,

Dada is alive. Dada was not dead; he was kidnapped. Ajit Dada has directly called Sharad Pawar. Yes, this is true. You might not
believe it, but CID has a video. In this video, a person is firmly saying that Dada is not dead, Dada is safe. Where exactly is Dada,
and who and where has he been hidden? All this has now come to light. A viral video went massively viral two days ago. Finally, CID
found the person who was speaking in that viral video, and after thoroughly investigating it, the whole truth came out. Sharad
Pawar received a phone call. What exactly was said on the phone? Until yesterday, no one could believe it. Everyone thought Dada
had left forever, but after a full month, suddenly a video comes out, and the person in it speaks with such certainty that even the
investigation agencies are shocked. That person is clearly saying that Dada contacted his own uncle, Sharad Pawar, from a secret
location. When this CID video became famous, the investigation really picked up pace, and Dada's secret started to come out. 
On one hand, while the entire Maharashtra was drowned in sorrow, everyone wondered how this man could say this with such
confidence. But finally, the real truth behind it came out. Really? So, is Dada alive? What exactly did he call Sharad Pawar? What
discussion took place on the phone? And how exactly did this man understand this secret? The answers to all these questions are
now revealed. After this video became popular, the investigating agencies immediately turned the tables and took this person into
custody. When the CID thoroughly investigated him, after hearing what he said, even the police officers themselves lost their
ground. Now, what exactly did this person see? To understand exactly how Dada's call went, we will have to go back two days. 
In Maharashtra, Dada's accident was completed a month ago, just two-three days ago. Only after that, the government report of the
accident came forward. In this official report, there were five things about the plane crash that would shock anyone. This is
considered 100% true because it is a government report. This report sparked a wave of doubt in people's minds, and discussions
about Dada's existence began. Rohit Pawar had also shown evidence and reports of the accident in 4-5 press conferences. Until
then, the controversy of whether it was Dada's accident or sabotage had been raised. But suddenly, this video of CID getting caught
changed the whole picture. The entire state felt that Maharashtra's beloved leader was lost in the terrible plane crash that occurred
in Baramati on January 28. The whole of Maharashtra was trying to forget this sorrow, but this video once again created a
sensation. 
The claims that person made in the video raised questions about the government report as well. The first clue to this mystery came
from the first point in the report. The first point in the report was that the plane did not crash where it was said to have crashed.
Yes, you are listening correctly. The government report says that the place of the plane was changed. It was said that the plane
crashed 50 meters away from the runway, but in reality, the plane had previously crashed on a tree. So, if the place was changed,
did anyone come out of it? This doubt was strong. In that, now the video that has come to the CID, in that the person is saying that
Dada is alive and he has called Kaka. Think about it, where errors are coming out in government documents, there people are
finding it easier to trust this person's claim. The CID is now tracking this phone call. If the phone call really happened, what could
have been said? This discussion has gained momentum. 
The second shocking thing in the report is who the sixth person was. That pile of planes is still burning in the Sahyadri mountains,
but the questions that are now being asked in every corner of Maharashtra are more burning than that fire. Initially, news came that
there were five people on the plane, but when the official passenger manifest of the Airport Authority, that is, the passenger list,
came to light, the administration was shocked. There were actually six names on the list. Then the question arises that if six people
had flown, then how were only five dead bodies found in the pile? Did the sixth man disappear into the air, or did he land
somewhere before the plane crashed? The real beginning of this mysterious story starts from here. 
The scene at the accident site was heart-wrenching. The plane was so badly burnt that even the metal sheets had melted and
become like paper. In such a situation, it was impossible to identify a human body, but the investigating officers revealed that the
identity of a dead body was determined by the clock in his hand. It sounds as simple as it is suspicious. How can a leather strap or a
simple metal watch remain safe in a fire where the plane's engine has been destroyed? Was this watch deliberately placed there?
This question, asked by people on social media, has now been recorded as a major suspicion in the CID's file. 
When a very important person like the Deputy Chief Minister travels, their movements are recorded every second. According to the
Air Traffic Control records, there is a significant difference of 20 minutes between when the plane took off from Mumbai and when it
was expected to appear on the Baramati radar. The plane was technically in good condition, the weather was clear, then where
exactly was this 20-minute plane? Did the plane change its course? Or did it deceive the radar and land somewhere secret? The
calculation of this time has completely changed the direction of the investigation. 
Another shocking point in the report is that last call. According to official information, the contact was lost two minutes before the
plane crashed, but according to sources, new information is emerging that the last call was not to air traffic control but to a private
number. Whose number was that, and what happened in that conversation? If Dada had actually called one of his close relatives,
what was the location of that phone? These questions have stirred up a wave of suspicion in the minds of the common people. 
When the whole of Maharashtra was in mourning, at the same time a video of an incomprehensible person spread like wildfire. That
man was emphatically saying that Dada is alive and he has been moved to a safe place. Initially, everyone ignored him, considering
him crazy, but when the CID took that man into custody, the matter took a different turn. He said in the inquiry that he had not
seen this dream, but he had seen it in the accounts. Now what exactly is this story? What secret information does he have? CID is
now searching for the mastermind behind this man. Is this man part of a big conspiracy or someone who plays with people's
emotions, spreading rumors, is not yet clear. 
In Maharashtra's politics, Dada is not just a position, but a courage. That's why common people feel that this is not just a case of
accidental death, but there could be some terrible political conspiracy behind it. People's love and technical errors in reports have
sparked such discussions, but today's bitter truth is that Dada is not officially with us. That video could be a ray of hope in people's

minds. The five raw dice in the hands of the CID and that mysterious video are pointing in the same direction, which may not seem
to be true. Who was that sixth person? Where did those 20 missing minutes of the plane go, and what is the mystery of that clock?
Until the answers to these questions are found, the fog in that valley of Sahyadri will not clear. 
For now, until official confirmation is received, do not trust rumors, but be careful, because in this game of politics, truth can be
more terrible than imagination. So friends, until now you have seen in this video how that government report and the video that has
fallen into the hands of the CID has created a stir throughout Maharashtra. But now the time has come to think a little calmly. Look,
many such discussions are currently going on on social media. Some feel they are a disaster. Some feel they are a mess. So, who
thinks Dada is safe? But keep one thing in mind, until any major system or Pawar family themselves puts a stamp on it, we can only
see this time as a claim and a possibility. 
Now I want to talk to you about an important thing. Our purpose of making this video is not to hurt anyone's feelings, but to address
the current discussions and the report that has come forward. Presenting that technical error to you is like having the 20 minutes
from a plane crash disappear, or the mystery of the sixth person. These questions are truly unanswered, and that's why doubts
arise in people's minds. You can find the answers in the comments below. I would love to know from you what you think. Could that
video of the government report and CID contain any truth? Who exactly would be the sixth person, or what do you think? And most
importantly, I really think Dada will come to meet us again. Whatever your opinion is, please write it openly in the comment box.
We read every comment because this topic is not just about politics; it is connected to the life of everyone's beloved leader. 
Now, before leaving, I will say this much: don't trust phones, but keep your eyes open because taking the truth is our right. So, if
you liked the video and found it informative, be sure to share it with your friends and on WhatsApp groups so that this information
reaches everyone. In the next part, we will discuss this case. We are going to try to reveal that private number on which the last
call was made. It is said that you should subscribe to the channel now to watch the video and don't forget to press the bell icon.

Dada is alive. Dada was not dead; he was kidnapped. Ajit Dada has directly called Sharad Pawar. Yes, this is true. You might not
believe it, but CID has a video. In this video, a person is firmly saying that Dada is not dead, Dada is safe. Where exactly is Dada,
and who and where has he been hidden? All this has now come to light. A viral video went massively viral two days ago. Finally, CID
found the person who was speaking in that viral video, and after thoroughly investigating it, the whole truth came out. Sharad
Pawar received a phone call. What exactly was said on the phone? Until yesterday, no one could believe it. Everyone thought Dada
had left forever, but after a full month, suddenly a video comes out, and the person in it speaks with such certainty that even the
investigation agencies are shocked. That person is clearly saying that Dada contacted his own uncle, Sharad Pawar, from a secret
location. When this CID video became famous, the investigation really picked up pace, and Dada's secret started to come out. 
On one hand, while the entire Maharashtra was drowned in sorrow, everyone wondered how this man could say this with such
confidence. But finally, the real truth behind it came out. Really? So, is Dada alive? What exactly did he call Sharad Pawar? What
discussion took place on the phone? And how exactly did this man understand this secret? The answers to all these questions are
now revealed. After this video became popular, the investigating agencies immediately turned the tables and took this person into
custody. When the CID thoroughly investigated him, after hearing what he said, even the police officers themselves lost their
ground. Now, what exactly did this person see? To understand exactly how Dada's call went, we will have to go back two days. 
In Maharashtra, Dada's accident was completed a month ago, just two-three days ago. Only after that, the government report of the
accident came forward. In this official report, there were five things about the plane crash that would shock anyone. This is
considered 100% true because it is a government report. This report sparked a wave of doubt in people's minds, and discussions
about Dada's existence began. Rohit Pawar had also shown evidence and reports of the accident in 4-5 press conferences. Until
then, the controversy of whether it was Dada's accident or sabotage had been raised. But suddenly, this video of CID getting caught
changed the whole picture. The entire state felt that Maharashtra's beloved leader was lost in the terrible plane crash that occurred
in Baramati on January 28. The whole of Maharashtra was trying to forget this sorrow, but this video once again created a
sensation. 
The claims that person made in the video raised questions about the government report as well. The first clue to this mystery came
from the first point in the report. The first point in the report was that the plane did not crash where it was said to have crashed.
Yes, you are listening correctly. The government report says that the place of the plane was changed. It was said that the plane
crashed 50 meters away from the runway, but in reality, the plane had previously crashed on a tree. So, if the place was changed,
did anyone come out of it? This doubt was strong. In that, now the video that has come to the CID, in that the person is saying that
Dada is alive and he has called Kaka. Think about it, where errors are coming out in government documents, there people are
finding it easier to trust this person's claim. The CID is now tracking this phone call. If the phone call really happened, what could
have been said? This discussion has gained momentum. 
The second shocking thing in the report is who the sixth person was. That pile of planes is still burning in the Sahyadri mountains,
but the questions that are now being asked in every corner of Maharashtra are more burning than that fire. Initially, news came that
there were five people on the plane, but when the official passenger manifest of the Airport Authority, that is, the passenger list,
came to light, the administration was shocked. There were actually six names on the list. Then the question arises that if six people
had flown, then how were only five dead bodies found in the pile? Did the sixth man disappear into the air, or did he land
somewhere before the plane crashed? The real beginning of this mysterious story starts from here. 
The scene at the accident site was heart-wrenching. The plane was so badly burnt that even the metal sheets had melted and
become like paper. In such a situation, it was impossible to identify a human body, but the investigating officers revealed that the
identity of a dead body was determined by the clock in his hand. It sounds as simple as it is suspicious. How can a leather strap or a
simple metal watch remain safe in a fire where the plane's engine has been destroyed? Was this watch deliberately placed there?
This question, asked by people on social media, has now been recorded as a major suspicion in the CID's file. 
When a very important person like the Deputy Chief Minister travels, their movements are recorded every second. According to the
Air Traffic Control records, there is a significant difference of 20 minutes between when the plane took off from Mumbai and when it
was expected to appear on the Baramati radar. The plane was technically in good condition, the weather was clear, then where
exactly was this 20-minute plane? Did the plane change its course? Or did it deceive the radar and land somewhere secret? The
calculation of this time has completely changed the direction of the investigation. 
Another shocking point in the report is that last call. According to official information, the contact was lost two minutes before the
plane crashed, but according to sources, new information is emerging that the last call was not to air traffic control but to a private
number. Whose number was that, and what happened in that conversation? If Dada had actually called one of his close relatives,
what was the location of that phone? These questions have stirred up a wave of suspicion in the minds of the common people. 
When the whole of Maharashtra was in mourning, at the same time a video of an incomprehensible person spread like wildfire. That
man was emphatically saying that Dada is alive and he has been moved to a safe place. Initially, everyone ignored him, considering
him crazy, but when the CID took that man into custody, the matter took a different turn. He said in the inquiry that he had not
seen this dream, but he had seen it in the accounts. Now what exactly is this story? What secret information does he have? CID is
now searching for the mastermind behind this man. Is this man part of a big conspiracy or someone who plays with people's
emotions, spreading rumors, is not yet clear. 
In Maharashtra's politics, Dada is not just a position, but a courage. That's why common people feel that this is not just a case of
accidental death, but there could be some terrible political conspiracy behind it. People's love and technical errors in reports have
sparked such discussions, but today's bitter truth is that Dada is not officially with us. That video could be a ray of hope in people's

minds. The five raw dice in the hands of the CID and that mysterious video are pointing in the same direction, which may not seem
to be true. Who was that sixth person? Where did those 20 missing minutes of the plane go, and what is the mystery of that clock?
Until the answers to these questions are found, the fog in that valley of Sahyadri will not clear. 
For now, until official confirmation is received, do not trust rumors, but be careful, because in this game of politics, truth can be

see this time as a claim and a possibility. 
Now I want to talk to you about an important thing. Our purpose of making this video is not to hurt anyone's feelings, but to address
the current discussions and the report that has come forward. Presenting that technical error to you is like having the 20 minutes
from a plane crash disappear, or the mystery of the sixth person. These questions are truly unanswered, and that's why doubts
arise in people's minds. You can find the answers in the comments below. I would love to know from you what you think. Could that
video of the government report and CID contain any truth? Who exactly would be the sixth person, or what do you think? And most
importantly, I really think Dada will come to meet us again. Whatever your opinion is, please write it openly in the comment box.
We read every comment because this topic is not just about politics; it is connected to the life of everyone's beloved leader. 
Now, before leaving, I will say this much: don't trust phones, but keep your eyes open because taking the truth is our right. So, if
you liked the video and found it informative, be sure to share it with your friends and on WhatsApp groups so that this information

happening on March 12. After this, the big Kisan Mela will be held in Ludhiana on the 20th and 21st. You must attend the fairs. All
the government doctors will also give you the same answer that no solution has been found yet. But whichever private sector
misleads you, whether there has been a solution to this or not, because a lot of material was sold last time as well. I was also asked
for a court response, and we have given that response. Because some greedy people do such things, the solution to which, because
the virus, whether it is the virus of cucumber bulbs, whether it is the virus of chili, the virus of cotton, the virus of mung beans,
there are viruses of many other crops. Their solutions have not been found from any pesticide company till date. Its solution is
found at the variety level, and variety is never ready in one day. It can take years and decades. So, whatever farmer fairs are going
to be held in the coming days, the Rauni Kisan Mela is happening on March 12, and the big Kisan Mela of Ludhiana is happening on
the 20th and 21st. You must go. And there, you don't have to come with bags and envelopes packed together. From there, for the

page_content:
Every farmer tries to ensure that their crop is good and yields the maximum. But the last three to fifteen yards of wheat... The last
45 days are the days in which it needs to ripen suddenly or ripen slowly. These two things are decided by how long the moisture
stays in the soil and what the weather is like. The weather is not in our control, but we can control the moisture in the soil. When we
plow the stubble into the soil or we keep the stubble mulched, the moisture remains intact for a long time. The plants remain
strong, and there is no evaporation of water in them. The ears fill up nicely, and there are no chances of fine grains forming in the
upper flies; they also become thick, and good grains are formed. It becomes a weight. The yield is to be made with each and every
grain. And in the ear, there are only grains. Don't be happy seeing 50 grains; don't be happy seeing 70 grains. If we do the
management correctly, then the field gives the maximum yield; the field doesn't show its back. We should not run away from our
responsibilities. It does not lack in applying fertilizers, but in the soil, organic matter, which I repeatedly say is our black gold, on
which we are not working. We should work on it, and in the coming years, it will also be our companion in the changing weather.

title: ???? ????? ???? ???? ?? ????? ?? ????? ???? ?? ???? ???? ?????? ???? maize vs moong farming in march
insights:
- Key feature themes detected: Mileage, Price and Offer, Technology and Controls.
- Sentiment evidence contains 3 positive, 1 neutral and 1 negative extracted opinion records.
page_content:
Hello farmers, Sat Sri Akal, I am Pargat Singh from Faslan Di Jankari. Now, after potatoes, the crop is mostly planted in two types.
There are three types of crops planted, in which maize has been added on a large scale. There are many varieties of corn. The good
time is in February; it has passed. We have entered March. We call this the post-spring. Actually, the proper time for spring is
February itself. Even in February, it is only until February 20-25. But the way the heat is increasing, you should give priority to
moong beans in March compared to maize. Where we protest that there's a deal with the US, and pulses are coming from abroad, if
pulses are coming from abroad, they might arrive late. Then you can get good rates for pulses in your market. So, the mung bean
crop, which is grown after potatoes, can give a large yield. The summer mung bean, which is sown after the wheat season, cannot
be said to have a good yield; it yields whatever it can. The one that is sown during the rainy season, we cannot say anything about
that either; the rains affect it. Because it is a short-duration crop, the same variety is sown 3 times, so it takes 3 different times. The
mung bean that is sown in March yields well. Potatoes contain a lot of fertilizer, etc. You can also sow by adding only seeds. How
can you sow in ridges, beds, and plains? We have shown you many varieties of mung beans in the last several years, including
Bansi Gold. There is Star's mung, there is Vijeta mung, private mung beans are there. Apart from this, there is Shakti Seed's mung,
there is VNR, there is Shaktivardhak. Or apart from this, you have PAU's mung, HAU's mung. The moong beans are very good; their
yield averages from 5 to 10 quintals, even up to 12 quintals with sowing done at this time. If we look at economics, and we are
comparing moong and maize, then moong beans will definitely take less time. Okay. If we compare it to ripe corn, the cost of
sowing and harvesting ripe corn can be ₹15,000 to ₹12,000. And if it's a crop worth ₹70,000 or ₹75,000, then subtracting ₹10,000
from that, our net income should be ₹60,000. We don't need to add any fertilizer to the mung beans. We only need to add seeds.
And its harvesting also happens easily with the combine harvester, and in this, if the yield is approximately 10 quintals, 9 quintals,
then in the market you can get a rate close to ₹7500, ₹7000, ₹8000. Although the MSP is higher, then your crop... It gives you
money and also improves your soil. So, this is a better option for you. Farmers with smaller areas can also move towards
vegetables. Avoid late-sown maize; you can plant it for silage, no problem. You can also plant paddy in the future, there is no
problem. Moong crop. It is used for your consumption; it is used to improve the health of your soil. It is not easily consumed; you
can get good seeds from the market. This should not be ignored. When any crop has a higher yield and the rate is lower, then the
next time its sowing is less. This time, something similar is going to happen with moong. The farmers who can sell themselves, the
farmers who can store, the farmers who can put it on MOU, the farmers who can... They will leave the produce and prefer mung
beans. I think their economics will remain the same, and the soil health will also improve because we are taking 3 crops, so we
should improve the soil health. Cannot ignore at all. In such a field, it doesn't take time to add manure, it doesn't take time to apply
laser level, it doesn't take time to plow deep. So, with more fertilizers, farming lasts longer.

applied. Sometimes, we see that after about 20 days, our wheat fields appear dry, and the wheat also seems to be requesting
water. Now, underneath, there is stubble lying here in all its ridges. After moving the stubble aside, even 20 days after the water is

second crop to grow. And if we apply water today, see how long the moisture will remain. This is its specialty, that due to the
increasing heat, the water circulation of this crop, the ability to hold the soil's water, is increased. Because of that, this crop reduces
yield due to increasing heat. If common wheat remains at 50 maunds per 20 quintals, then it won't be so low. If it's 65 maunds of
wheat, then 60 maunds will be produced. So, this is a plus point. It improved the soil's health. It also increased the yield of our
wheat. The Happy Seeder method is very successful, and we have been doing this for many years. Those brothers who are doing it,
please do share your experience.

description:
#wheat #crop #punjab #npk 


Managing heat stress in wheat, particularly terminal heat stress.

 during grain filling), involves timely sowing, selecting heat-tolerant varieties, proper irrigation, and nutrient management. Key strategies include planting in mid-November, applying potassium nitrate or potassium-based fertilizers, maintaining soil moisture with light irrigations, using zero tillage, and employing mulch to keep the root zone cool. 


Key Heat Stress Management Strategies:

Timely Sowing & Cultivar Selection:

Early Sowing: Avoid late planting to ensure the grain-filling stage does not coincide with high temperatures in March/April.

Heat-Tolerant Varieties: Use varieties bred for tolerance to high temperatures.

Irrigation and Water Management:

Critical Irrigation: Provide light and frequent irrigations, specifically at the booting, anthesis, and grain-filling stages, to manage soil moisture and reduce canopy temperature.

Efficient Methods: Use sprinkler or drip irrigation for better water use efficiency.

Nutrient and Chemical Management:

Potassium (K) Fertilization: Apply Muriate of Potash (

 Potassium Nitrate (



) to help maintain plant osmotic balance and protect grain filling.

Exogenous Protectants: Foliar spray of nutrients like Zinc (Zn) and growth regulators like salicylic acid, thiourea, or calcium chloride can alleviate stress.

Cultural Practices:

Conservation Agriculture: Adopt zero-tillage or reduced tillage, which helps in retaining soil moisture and reducing soil temperature.

Mulching: Use crop residues as mulch to maintain a lower, more stable soil temperature.

Residue Management: Retaining surface residues helps lower the soil temperature compared to conventional tillage. 

Springer Nature Link +8

Impact of Heat Stress on Wheat:
Heat stress, especially above 



 for consecutive days during grain filling, accelerates maturity and reduces nutrient translocation to the grains, leading to reduced grain size, weight, and overall yield

They have given a new update in Fleet Track specifically for those who use tractors for rent. That is AI measurement. For those who
use two or three tractors for rent, this update is a huge benefit. Once you finish driving the tractor for rent, you can measure the
field within two seconds. You can clearly see how many acres and how long it has been driven in this GPS. That feature has been
newly added to Fleet Track GPS. If this GPS is in your tractor, the gardeners who own the tractor cannot be cheated. It's a beneficial
product. If you place an order, they will directly reach out to you, install the product, tell you what needs to be done, and give you
instructions. If you want to know the details about this product, if you contact the number shown on the screen, they will install it
for free and give you instructions. Thank you. Greetings.

title: 100+ Tractor, JCB and Tipper Bannari Amman Temple Cleaning 2026 | Agriculture INDIA
description:
Welcome to our YouTube channel ?? 

Bannari Amman Temple famous Temple in our Area. Temple located In Tamil nadu Karnataka border. Every March festival starts here, lakhs of devotees participate here. Before the festival Tractor and JCB owners near by Temple conducting Temple cleaning by them selves.  

Thanks for watching ?? 

#bannariamman #tractorvideo #mahindra #johndeere #swaraj #newholland #deutz_fahr #sonalika #jcb #bull #cat #leyland #festival #selfservice #tamil #tamilnadu #india

page_content:
Hello everyone, I am your Selvakumar. In this video, we are going to see about the annual fasting in Bannari. Before that festival, in
the villages surrounding Bannari, that is, in Erode district, in the Gobi area, in Sathyamangalam, and also in the south Nambiyur
area, JCB and tractor owners gathered and did the renovation work for the temple. They had invited us for that function. We had
posted a video three years ago. Since we couldn't attend for the past two years, we had to go this year. Brother Nishanth, if you
see, this is his footage from Agri Track India. Thank you very much for his support. We couldn't reach before the pooja. We were
able to reach only after the work started after the pooja. 
All the tractors, if you see, stopped and bought a new oil press. After performing all the poojas, they started doing the work and
repairs. By 6 AM in the morning, all the tractor owners went and joined there. They neatly lined up the vehicles. After finishing the
garland decoration and cutting all the cloth, they finished the pooja and started doing the work. If you see correctly, the pooja
happened in the morning around 8 to 9. All the tractor and JCB owners, you see, went and joined there by 6 AM. If you see which
place this is, it's where the tractors are parked. They would have built a hall. If you see the ground, it will be on the north side. It is
on that ground that they stopped the tractors and performed pooja during this time. If you see every year, if you look at the way to
the Miniyappan temple on the west side of that temple, they stopped at that place and performed pooja. Because the number of
vehicles is increasing year after year, they stopped at the ground this year and performed pooja. 
JCB, tractors, mini Hitachi—all these owners had participated. Mostly this year, in the new track, in the new arrival, John Deere was
seen more. 54 cc, 50 75 were taken more. Apart from that, this year John Deere Dozer, Semi Dozer, had come. If you look at this
backhoe loader, you'll see more Bobcats and Aces coming out like this. All of that, if you see, came out very less this year. Bobcat
had only one backhoe loader. JCB, CAT—it was mostly in that. If you see in bull, there were a lot of new arrivals in the backhoe
loader. Mostly JCB—JCB was always the king. If you see in that, there were a lot of arrivals. If you look at tractors, mostly Suraj in
the low HP category. In Ford, 3600, 610, 620. Farmtrac 60. These tractors were abundant. Even now, many people, if you see, there
are still many fans for Farmtrac 744 and all these. Especially, if you see, Ford tractors. Then a lot of people, like those who have
Ford 724, everyone had switched to John Deere 5310. Even in Swaraj, many tractors had higher HP, like the 963, 969—all these
were there. If you see in Mahindra, there were no new arrivals at all. They all had old tractors. It was the same in New Holland too.
5510—many vehicles had come. Be it four-wheel drive or two-wheel drive, there were many new arrivals. Then there were many
HMT dozers. 59 11, 65 22—many models like these had come. Then in Sonalika, in the Old Track series, there were many 62-wheel
drives. Sam 603. If you see in Jandy, there are 51 Cyper 5, 53 10, 50 75 old models, 50 75 latest. In Sonalika, Tiger 75 HP,
5500—like this, if you see many tractors, many tractors had come for this festival's return. 
If you see correctly, they finished all the pooja and moved the tractors. After eating, they took the vehicles and started working. It
was only at that time that I was able to go correctly. Thank you so much again for providing the footage to Thambi Nishanth. If you
look at his channel, he mentions it as Agri Track India. Many tractors in Sathyamangalam, Gopi area, and around Nambiyur village
have put up review performances. I'll attach the link; please do check it out. 
And then, first, as soon as we entered, you could see that the pooja ground itself had a lot of artificial plants, weeds—all of that was
there. And then, a lot of soil was thrown in the building. A lot of that waste was lying around. The process of removing all that was
going on. The soil that was thrown after demolishing this building, this waste—all of it, you see, they loaded it through a tractor and
brought it to a place where there was a pit and dumped it. If you see in this ground, there were Velimool plants in many places. All
those plants were uprooted and thrown away. Then, the JS Agra stall was set up. The tire company set up their stall and supported
all the contractors who work on tractors by providing water, biscuits, and things like that. A thank you to them. After that, regarding
the temple renovation, they gave tea to the owner who owns the tractor. Thank you very much for that temple renovation. 
And then, the JCB owners and tractor owners who came from around—a very big thank you to all of them. If you see like this, doing
a renovation, a blessing will come and join them. If you see doing this for Amman, it gives a very big benefit. Now, they performed
the pooja at the temple ground. If you see in that place, work is going on now. If you see in this place, half of the vehicles worked.
Then at the temple ground, half of the vehicles went to the ground area where the temple is located. Then, if you see in the road
area around the temple and the main road area, a lot of work went on. If you see the place where they stopped and performed the
pooja, there were a lot of fence plants. A lot of fence plants, garbage—they had demolished the building and put a lot of soil. There
were a lot of concrete pillars and all. After cleaning all that, I'll show you the final output in the last video. See how it is. 
Many people, you see, had brought their own tractors, big tractors. Now, in today's era, you see, everyone has started getting many
big tractors like 63 HP, 75 HP. They had brought all those tractors. In the new arrivals, you see, Sonalika. The Jandierla Higher HP is
very popular in our area. All those tractors, you see, were brought here. Even now, many people in Erode district don't participate in
this. It feels like a big festival when everyone comes. Everyone in the Erode surrounding areas, like Gopi, Sathyamangalam,
Nambiyur, Avinashi—all the tractor owners in these areas—it still feels like a festival when they come. Right now, if you see, there
are almost 100 tractors. In total, there are 100 counts. JCB, tipper, mini Hitachi tractors—all together, if you see, there are 100
counts. To that extent, vehicles had come. 
In the temple ground, if you see, work was going on in a bustling manner. Cleaning through this fence. Removing all the weeds and
plants, all the unwanted plants—this kind of process, you see, was going on with a lot of hustle and bustle. We were shooting all
these works. He is Priya Groups. He is on Instagram. For a function, Dinesh, my younger brother, invited us. He is my relative. He
called me and said, "Brother, you must come," and gave full support. Thank you very much to Dinesh. Also, for the past two years, I
haven't been able to make videos correctly. This year, I must definitely go, and I have come. In Dinesh Circle, a total of three
vehicles with 744 were available. Among them, my classmate's vehicle, Tamil, was also available, and his vehicle was also
available. The tractors were all in a hurry, you see. They removed all the waste, the pillars, and also the electric post, concrete
pillars, stones, soil—like that, they brought everything and put it in the area that was on the side. 

This person, you see, named Jana—his Instagram, you see, they are saying it's Jana. He has an Oja mini tractor. He has a Mahindra
655. Then, if you see, there is a Mahindra 595 Turbo from Sathyamangalam. That tractor, that also came. They are coming every
year. Many people are asking for a 595 Turbo review. We will update it soon. Also, if you see this 595 Turbo, they have repainted
and reconditioned it and kept it properly. If you see the vehicle. If you see Sonalika 75, the unloading has started. If you see, my
younger brother Nishanth and I were together taking all these videos. Thanks to him again for all the video support. He was the one
who invited me first, like calling me a week ago. Correct? All the work, you see, is going on in a bustling manner. After unloading
everything, they worked very actively. In that way, everyone gave full support. Every year, when coming to the temple, you see,
this year many people, including me, missed it. Many people couldn't come. That was a big missing point. 
In Hitachi, you see, Bobcat and XCMG had come. XCMG, you see, in the temple ground, the process of cleaning the ditch was going
on. This XCMG owner, if you see, is Ishan Earth Movers. It's theirs. I'm mentioning their visiting card. If anyone needs it, contact
them. It comes with Kubota's 28 HP engine. It's very fast, if you see all the work. They showed what all can be done in this XCMG.
That 360. They showed track rotation at 360 degrees and all that. Thanks to the operator. Also, this XCMG is a quality brand. If you
see any maintenance cost, it won't be too high. That brand was there. If you see them, they have almost finished all the ditch work.
If you see when we go and take the video. John Deere's dozer, Semi's dozer, then HMT's dozer—all of these were there. If you see in
John Deere, recently many people are starting to use dozers. If you see in 5310, in 5310 this is an ordinary model, the engine that
came before the CRD. In that engine, if you see, the dozer was attached. What is that? It looks like a TikTok when speaking. What
model is the vehicle? Four, 2000. They were doing dosing in HMT. If you see 59 11, two vehicles were doing dosing in the same
place. If you see this HMT, it is a different feel. The tractor has more weight. If you see almost, the tractor's weight comes to around
three tons. Extra ballast weight this. When doing mounting, there is good traction power. Also, mileage—mainly mileage will be
super in HMT. Low-end torque is good. Almost 4000 cc, if you see its engine, from 1990 to 2005, this model was released. Now, the
two models we are looking at, one is a 2000 model, and the other is a 98 model. Both vehicles had superb performance. There were
no shortcomings. If correct and proper maintenance is done, its mileage and performance are superb. 
If you see in the temple ground, this cleaning work was going on. Almost, if you see, while taking this dosing, almost it was around
11 or 12 o'clock. Even then, if you see, almost all the work was completed. The dosing work, if you see, they had done it superbly.
After cleaning everything, if you see, all that cleaning, if you see, they loaded it through JCB and poured it into the area where there
were pits. In our video, we would have mentioned the area where the pooja was performed at the beginning. If you see that place,
look at it after all the work is completely finished. The entire area was covered with fences and thorny bushes. Look at it after all
the work is finished. See how cleanly the work has been completed. This is the area where the goat is slaughtered. That is the
temple ground. It was taken in that area. 
Next, if you see, the temple complex. If you see in the temple complex, see how much work has been completed. In that area also,
if you see, all the work was completed through JCB, and trench work was completed through mini Hitachi. Similarly, if you see,
through JCB, many pillars were passed through, and it was completely loaded onto the tipper, taken to the tractor, and dumped. All
the work was completely finished. It was super. If you see the finishing, all the work is almost complete. Only a few vehicles were
running. Since all the work was completed, the tractor and JCB owners took the vehicles in the shade and started taking rest. During
this time, the temple administration provided tea for everyone. Thanks to the administration. The tractor owners also fully
supported and did everything well. 
Please share your thoughts about this video. Also, mention if you are doing any work like this in your area. If you like this video,
please subscribe to the channel, like, and share it. We will meet again with another interesting video recording. Thank you,
greetings.

Hello, my name is M. Udhayakumar Singh. I am a flour farmer. I have been farming flour for 30 years. This is an ancestry property.
From the time I came to maintain this, I have been doing all the improvements that I wanted to make. Traditionally, earlier we used
to do mango plantation maintenance activities with laborers. After the labor shortage came, we thought we could go for
implementation. Then, when we looked around here, we saw a VST tractor. It was very convenient. So, thinking that my problem
would be solved, I bought it, and I am using it. How I use this tractor in the mango orchard is, as soon as the harvest is over, we
plow it for the first time. After that, after two or three plowings, once the weeds appear, we mulch all the weeds with a rotavator. In
the last moisture, we put the seedlings. After putting the seedlings, we will spray after the flowering is induced. The reason I chose
this VST vehicle is because it is a compact vehicle. Four-wheel drive. It is lightweight and doesn't undergo subsurfing or hardening.
Diesel consumption is very low. This is economical for the farmer. The advantage is that if we drive close to the tree, all the weeds
near the tree will be controlled. Otherwise, we have to manually hire someone to remove them. Because it has dual PTO, all
PTO-related implements can be used. I am using a sprayer in this. It can be used very efficiently. It has 9 forward gears. There are
three reverse gears. All the gears are smoothly operated, like driving in a car. It's easy to drive. If the driver can't come for an
emergency, because the car is in the field, I can easily take control and use the easy gears to drive myself. In the harvesting
season, to shift mangoes in crates, you can load up to 4 tons and pull it out in a tractor trolley. Because it has four-wheel drive, you
can easily shift it. Because the VST tractor was chosen, I have a lot of benefits. Using timely implements, production can be
increased well. It can be efficiently and timely shifted. Spares availability, service backup, everything is perfect. All of these ideas
and experiences are unique to the individual users who shared them. They do not reflect our opinions and thoughts. Each user's
experience is unique to them. Therefore, it is not necessary that all users using this product will have the same experience. We
collaborate with the company to compile and present the experiences of the users using this product, and we receive funds from
them for that. However, the users who share their feedback have not received any funds from the company or from us.

page_content:
Hello everyone, you are watching Great Maharashtra Channel. So, we always bring you videos of different entrepreneurs—those
who do agriculture-related businesses, like dairy farming, crop farming, and animal husbandry. We bring you videos of many of
them. I am now in Kankavli, which is in the Sindhudurg district, where Nath Pik Farm is located. So, we have visited Sir's farm, and
we will learn about the Pik Farm from him. If you also want to do this business and want to know more about it, their number is on
the screen; you can contact them on that. Please tell me your name and address once. 
Hello. First of all, my greetings to the listeners of Great Maharashtra. My name is Nilesh Sawant, and the name of our pig farm is
Nath Pik Farm, and it is in the Sindhudurg district. It is located in Taluka Kankavli and Bhironde village. How much distance is there
to come here exactly from Kankavli? Taluka Kankavli means it is approximately 11 kilometers away from the district railway station.
And Kolhapur is also near here, right? Kolhapur is 100 kilometers away from here. That means for the people coming from
Maharashtra here, it’s nearby. Yes, they can come via the Mumbai-Goa highway, or they can come via the Pune-Bangalore highway
via Kolhapur. 
Now, how many crops are there on the farm? How many animals are there in total? Sir, we started 3 years ago. On our farm,
including small animals, there are approximately 500 animals now, including kids, etc. So, first introduce yourself—how did you
start this business, and how did you turn to this business? 
Okay. So, as I mentioned, my name is Nilesh Nana Sawant. I am originally from Konkan, from Sindhudurg. You must have seen the
beauty of Konkan. Since childhood, I am actually an engineer. Our initial period was a bit difficult. My father passed away in my
childhood. After that, my mother, by doing small jobs, raised us. I also did part-time college and completed engineering. From the
beginning, I had a desire to come to the village and do something. But at that time, the financial situation was not favorable. I have
worked as an engineer in almost 19-20 countries, in the Middle East, Europe, and Africa. From the beginning, I wanted to work in
our village, in our Konkan region. My mother also wanted it because my father passed away in my childhood. She wanted to live in
the village, as she has always lived in the village. 
Our Konkan is very beautiful; you must have seen it already. So, she and I live here. My son and wife live in Mumbai because their
son is studying. We were together in a foreign country. So, here, it’s me and my mother, and we have some business in Konkan. I
was looking for a business, but in our Konkan region, there aren’t many trees because there isn’t much water, and the land isn’t
good either. Cow rearing and chicken rearing are challenging in today’s context because of labor issues, etc. Since our Goa market
is nearby, we thought that we should do crop farming and pig farming. There is a lot of demand in Goa, and if we do it on dry feed,
then we will definitely have a good demand for it. That’s why we did research for the first one or two years, and we started pig
farming three years ago. 
What difficulties did you face when you were coming to this field? The problem is, generally, when we work in livestock, they get
sick, they die, and their management is hard. It’s not like you just keep them. You have to feed them every day, take care of them,
treat them, check their delivery on time, and monitor their mating. This was very challenging. But one thing about it was that you
couldn’t extract milk, etc. You had to feed them and manage their delivery, which was possible for me because I studied. Since
childhood, I had never touched animals. But I said no, we can do it. 
So, we first researched who is doing this. As I told you, it is done in two ways. One is done on kitchen waste, and the other on dry
feed. We didn’t want to work on kitchen waste because, in kitchen waste, you see, today we are sitting on my farm, and you are
sitting comfortably. With kitchen waste, there is so much foul smell that it is difficult to work. Secondly, the people who work on
kitchen waste are on edge because, look, what does a person need to live? Protein, vitamins, and minerals are needed. But you
don’t get that in kitchen waste; it’s rotten food. It creates toxicity. But when you give dry feed, like corn, soybean, rice DOC, etc., it
has all the proteins, vitamins, and minerals for the body. So, if you do that, the animal grows properly. The animal grows faster, and
the number of offspring is higher. 
From the beginning, we wanted to do dry feed. But there are few people who do that kind of work. We did research. We went to UP,
Haryana, Punjab, and various places to learn how it happens, what kind of animal it is, and how to manage it from the beginning to
the end. 
What did you do after going to Punjab and Haryana? We went there and did research, as you mentioned, like how they perform the
conception of a female, what care should be taken of a pregnant female, what precautions should be taken while delivering, and
what should be done for the newborn. We thoroughly learned what feed to give to the female, how to give it, how the chick grows
from it, in how many months it becomes 100 kg, and how the sale happens. 
So now, in our area, is this business that you are doing the first one, or is it still going on? No, no sir, they are already here. We are
near Goa, so there are many farms here that work on kitchen waste. I think there are only 3-4 farms that work on dry feed. Among
them, our largest farm is in Kankavli, which is in the Sindhudurg district. 
Are you working in the breeding sector? Yes, actually, there is more benefit in working in the breeding sector because if you
increase your own production, it is cheaper for us, meaning the profit is higher. Therefore, breeding is very important. Currently,
how many chicks are there on your farm in total? As I told you earlier, there are a total of 500 animals, small and big, so we have a
mother stock of 50. They have kids with an average of eight. So, approximately, we have 500 animals now. 
How many offspring does a female have in a year, and how is her annual maintenance? Before that, let’s find out when the female’s
mating comes into heat. Generally, when a chick comes out of the mother’s womb, it drinks the mother’s milk for 30-35 days. Then,
after a month, the chick is separated from the mother. In six, seven, or eight months, it becomes 70-80 kg. Once it becomes 70-80

kg, we mate the female, meaning we inseminate it. After insemination, it delivers in about 114 days. During this time, it is
dewormed and given medicines at 30 days, 60 days, and 110 days. 
After delivery, what do you do with her? For one female, approximately, in India, the average is eight offspring. Some females have
16 offspring, some have 14, some have 12, some have 10, some have 7, and some have 6. The average is eight. Our average is
now nine and a half. When we started, our average was eight. 
What new construction have you used in the farm you have developed, and what precautions should be taken while developing the
farm? Actually, the biggest expense in this business is for construction and feed. The female that is breeding needs a space of
50-60 square feet, a separate compartment. After she becomes pregnant, she stays there until delivery. The offspring require 20
square feet of space. For 10 females and 80 offspring, approximately 1,500 square feet of space is needed. 
What feed management do you use, and why should new people do this business only on feed? By doing it on feed, the animal
grows properly. The offspring get all the protein and vitamins, and they grow quickly. There are four types of feed: starter feed,
grower feed, breeder feed, and finisher feed. 
How is its sales market? Selling is easy if you do research and meet people. This business is very good. There are three types of
sales: selling a puppy, selling mutton, and selling females for breeding. 
What method do you use to breed them? It’s a natural method. There is one male for every 10 females. 
What advice would you give to those who want to do this business? Don’t rely on success stories alone. Do your own research. Visit
farms, meet farmers, and ask questions. Understand the budget, shed costs, and feed expenses. Take proper training. 
What services and facilities do you provide for farmers through your farm? We provide complete consultancy, from building the
shed to selling the animals. We help farmers until they come into profit. 
How many entrepreneurs have you created so far? In our area, we have created space for 4 to 5 people. 
Can this business run with laborers, and how to make laborers available? Initially, the owner should prepare to work hard. You can
hire local people or workers from UP, Bihar, or Nepal. 
For the new one, how many animals should they start with initially? It depends on the budget. Start with two females, four females,
or five females, or take 10-50 chicks. 
Where can this business run more? It will work anywhere in Maharashtra. There is a lot of demand for it. 
Is export-import happening in foreign countries as well? Not yet, as the required quality is not being made in our country. 
What advice would you have for those who want to do this business? Do proper research. Don’t go after success stories alone.
Understand the budget and take proper training. 
What is the budget required for one female? You need approximately ₹1,30,000 for one female, including her living space, feed,
and other expenses. 
Congratulations to you from Great Maharashtra Channel for the project you have launched.

Hello farmers, Sat Sri Akal, I am Pargat Singh from Faslan Di Jankari. Now, after potatoes, the crop is mostly planted in two types.
There are three types of crops planted, in which maize has been added on a large scale. There are many varieties of corn. The good
time is in February; it has passed. We have entered March. We call this the post-spring. Actually, the proper time for spring is
February itself. Even in February, it is only until February 20-25. But the way the heat is increasing, you should give priority to
moong beans in March compared to maize. Where we protest that there's a deal with the US, and pulses are coming from abroad, if
pulses are coming from abroad, they might arrive late. Then you can get good rates for pulses in your market. So, the mung bean
crop, which is grown after potatoes, can give a large yield. The summer mung bean, which is sown after the wheat season, cannot
be said to have a good yield; it yields whatever it can. The one that is sown during the rainy season, we cannot say anything about
that either; the rains affect it. Because it is a short-duration crop, the same variety is sown 3 times, so it takes 3 different times. The
mung bean that is sown in March yields well. Potatoes contain a lot of fertilizer, etc. You can also sow by adding only seeds. How
can you sow in ridges, beds, and plains? We have shown you many varieties of mung beans in the last several years, including
Bansi Gold. There is Star's mung, there is Vijeta mung, private mung beans are there. Apart from this, there is Shakti Seed's mung,
there is VNR, there is Shaktivardhak. Or apart from this, you have PAU's mung, HAU's mung. The moong beans are very good; their
yield averages from 5 to 10 quintals, even up to 12 quintals with sowing done at this time. If we look at economics, and we are
comparing moong and maize, then moong beans will definitely take less time. Okay. If we compare it to ripe corn, the cost of
sowing and harvesting ripe corn can be ₹15,000 to ₹12,000. And if it's a crop worth ₹70,000 or ₹75,000, then subtracting ₹10,000
from that, our net income should be ₹60,000. We don't need to add any fertilizer to the mung beans. We only need to add seeds.
And its harvesting also happens easily with the combine harvester, and in this, if the yield is approximately 10 quintals, 9 quintals,
then in the market you can get a rate close to ₹7500, ₹7000, ₹8000. Although the MSP is higher, then your crop... It gives you
money and also improves your soil. So, this is a better option for you. Farmers with smaller areas can also move towards
vegetables. Avoid late-sown maize; you can plant it for silage, no problem. You can also plant paddy in the future, there is no
problem. Moong crop. It is used for your consumption; it is used to improve the health of your soil. It is not easily consumed; you
can get good seeds from the market. This should not be ignored. When any crop has a higher yield and the rate is lower, then the
next time its sowing is less. This time, something similar is going to happen with moong. The farmers who can sell themselves, the
farmers who can store, the farmers who can put it on MOU, the farmers who can... They will leave the produce and prefer mung
beans. I think their economics will remain the same, and the soil health will also improve because we are taking 3 crops, so we
should improve the soil health. Cannot ignore at all. In such a field, it doesn't take time to add manure, it doesn't take time to apply
laser level, it doesn't take time to plow deep. So, with more fertilizers, farming lasts longer.
